jobs.description: <h4><strong>About the Job:&nbsp;</strong></h4> <p>We’re looking for a driven, customer-focused sales professional to join our Corporate Account Executive team at LaunchDarkly. In this role, you’ll manage the full sales cycle, partnering with sales leadership, solutions engineers, and cross-functional teams to guide corporate customers across EMEA through evaluation, purchase, and successful adoption of LaunchDarkly.</p> <p>If you thrive in a fast-paced, consultative sales environment, have experience selling to small and mid-sized companies, and are eager to make an impact, we’d love to meet you.</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Outbound Pipeline Development. </strong>Proactively prospect into and qualify ICP target accounts across the EMEA region.</li> <li><strong>Discovery &amp; Value Alignment. </strong>Lead discovery sessions to understand customer goals and challenges. Articulate LaunchDarkly’s core use cases and demonstrate the value of our usage-based pricing model.</li> <li><strong>Solution Presentation &amp; Demos. </strong>Partner with Solutions Engineers to customise and deliver impactful demos. Lead proofs of concept that showcase measurable value to customers.</li> <li><strong>Customer Relationship Management. </strong>Build strong relationships with prospects and existing customers. Identify and develop new opportunities within existing accounts. Educate and guide customers through the adoption of LaunchDarkly.</li> <li><strong>Collaboration &amp; Enablement. </strong>Work closely with internal teams, including customer success, support, and product to ensure customer needs are met. Deliver customer insights and feedback to influence product direction.</li> <li><strong>Forecasting &amp; Reporting.&nbsp;</strong>Maintain accurate data in Salesforce and sales tools. Provide consistent, reliable forecasting on a weekly and monthly basis. Meet or exceed quarterly revenue targets.</li> </ul> <h4>About You:</h4> <ul> <li><strong data-renderer-mark="true"><strong>Proven Sales Success. </strong></strong>Strong track record of exceeding quota in a SaaS sales environment.</li> <li><strong data-renderer-mark="true"><strong>Consultative Selling Skills. </strong></strong>Skilled in running discovery, managing multiple stakeholders, and selling value-based solutions.</li> <li><strong data-renderer-mark="true"><strong>Self-Starter &amp; Organized.</strong></strong> Highly motivated, disciplined, and able to manage multiple priorities independently.</li> <li><strong data-renderer-mark="true"><strong>Customer-Centric Mindset. </strong></strong>Passionate about understanding customer challenges and delivering solutions that drive outcomes.</li> <li><strong data-renderer-mark="true"><strong>Collaborative &amp; Curious.&nbsp;</strong></strong>Team-oriented, intellectually curious, and eager to grow your career at LaunchDarkly.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred Experience</strong></p> <ul> <li>1+ years of success in a closing role within SaaS sales. (Or, have a proven track record of hitting or exceeding quota)</li> <li>Experience selling to corporate or SMB customers.</li> <li>Technical Aptitude. Familiar with cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and comfortable discussing technical architectures. Familiarity with developer tools or DevOps solutions is a plus.</li> </ul> <h4><strong>About LaunchDarkly:</strong></h4> <p>Modern software delivery was supposed to be the foundation for a thriving digital business but reality has proven otherwise. Slow, inefficient development cycles, costly outages, and fragmented customer experiences are preventing developers from building their best software. The LaunchDarkly platform helps developers innovate on new features faster while protecting them with a safety valve to instantly rewind when things go wrong. Developers can target product experiences to any customer segment and maximize the business impact of every feature. And by gradually rolling out new application components, they escape nightmare "big-bang" technology migrations.&nbsp;</p> <p>The LaunchDarkly platform was built to guide engineers to the next frontier of DevOps by:</p> <ul> <li>Improving the velocity and stability of software releases, without the fear of end customer outages</li> <li>Delivering targeted experiences by easily personalizing features to customer cohorts</li> <li>Maximizing the business impact of every feature through the ability to experiment and optimize</li> <li>Coordinating the release and optimization of software to provide consistent experiences across mobile platforms and device types</li> <li>Improving the effectiveness and productivity of engineering teams, by providing insights into engineering cadence and stability</li> </ul> <p>At LaunchDarkly, we believe in the power of teams. We're building a team that is humble, open, collaborative, respectful and kind. We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.</p> <p class="p1"><span class="s1"><strong>Do you need a disability accommodation?</strong></span></p> <p class="p1">Fill out this&nbsp;<a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdYb_7upYMtdRVXzvXGHGfQw0pU2FNma-6Rwp-I6NjKm7SYNw/viewform"><span class="s2">accommodations request form</span></a>&nbsp;and someone from our People Operations team will contact you for assistance.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Your safety matters to us.</strong> To protect yourself from potential scams, LaunchDarkly recruiters will only contact you from <a href="https://launchdarkly.slack.com/team/UKEE4GBS6" target="_blank">@LaunchDarkly</a>.com email addresses or via LinkedIn from "Verified Recruiter" accounts.<strong> </strong>Be cautious of emails from other domains.&nbsp; Legitimate LaunchDarkly recruiters will never ask for money, fees, or banking information before making a job offer. LaunchDarkly will never make a job offer without conducting a formal interview process. Our interview process does not involve asking detailed questions by email. If you are ever unsure about a communication that you receive, don't click any links—visit <a href="https://launchdarkly.com/careers/" target="_blank">Careers | LaunchDarkly</a>&nbsp; directly for confirmed job openings and links to apply.<br><br>Please notify us of any fraudulent representation by sending an email to <a href="mailto:careers@launchdarkly.com" target="_blank">careers@launchdarkly.com</a>.</p>

jobs.title: Mid-Market Account Executive - Australia
jobs.description: <h4><strong>About the Job:</strong></h4> <p>We’re looking for a strategic, customer-focused sales professional to help expand our Mid-Market Account Executive team at LaunchDarkly. In this role, you'll own the sales cycle—partnering with sales leadership, solutions engineers, and cross-functional teams to guide mid-market organizations through evaluation, purchase, and adoption of LaunchDarkly.</p> <p>If you thrive in a fast-paced, consultative sales environment, have a track record of closing mid-market deals, and are eager to make an impact, we want you on our team. This is a fantastic chance to join a fast-growing company and make a real impact.</p> <h4>Responsibilities:</h4> <ul> <li><strong>Strategic Pipeline Development:</strong> Proactively generate and manage outbound pipeline opportunities within accounts of up to 2,000 employees.</li> <li><strong>Ownership &amp; Relationship Management:</strong> Build and nurture strong relationships with mid-market accounts, serving as their primary point of contact.</li> <li><strong>Territory &amp; Account Planning:</strong> Develop and execute strategic plans to maximize growth and customer engagement within your territory.</li> <li><strong>Customer Success &amp; Adoption:</strong> Drive successful adoption of LaunchDarkly by leveraging account management best practices and collaborating with pre- and post-sales engineering, customer success, and support teams.</li> <li><strong>Executive Engagement:</strong> Effectively communicate LaunchDarkly’s value proposition to key stakeholders, including VP- and C-suite executives, to elevate brand awareness and drive decision-making.</li> <li><strong>Solution-Oriented Sales Approach:</strong> Collaborate closely with your Solutions Engineer to provide strategic business and technical insights that directly align with customer objectives, driving value and long-term success.</li> <li><strong>Cross-functional Collaboration:</strong> Work closely with internal teams—including customer success, support, marketing, and revenue operations—to ensure customer needs are met efficiently.</li> <li><strong>Accurate Forecasting &amp; Reporting:</strong> Maintain high forecasting accuracy and consistency to support business growth and predictability.</li> </ul> <h4>About You:</h4> <ul> <li><strong>Proven Sales Success:</strong> A strong track record in mid-market software sales, consistently closing five- to six-figure deals.</li> <li><strong>Self-Starter Mentality:</strong> Entrepreneurial, highly motivated, and driven to take initiative.</li> <li><strong>Growth-Oriented:</strong> Passionate about learning, evolving, and building a successful career at LaunchDarkly.</li> <li><strong>Curious &amp; Ambitious:</strong> Intellectually curious, eager to solve challenges, and motivated to exceed goals.</li> <li><strong>Exceptional Communicator:</strong> Outstanding written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to engage and influence key stakeholders.</li> <li><strong>Highly Organized &amp; Independent:</strong> Skilled at managing multiple priorities with autonomy and efficiency.</li> <li><strong>Thrives in a Fast-Paced Environment:</strong> Energized by working in a dynamic, rapidly growing organization.</li> </ul> <h4>Qualifications:</h4> <ul> <li><strong>Proven Sales Experience:</strong> 3+ years of proven success in a closing role at a SaaS company, consistently exceeding targets and earning recognition such as President’s Club or equivalent top-performer awards.</li> <li><strong>Consultative Selling Expertise:</strong> Ability to navigate and manage complex sales cycles with a value-driven approach.</li> <li><strong>Land &amp; Expand Strategy:</strong> Strong track record of successfully expanding accounts across business units.</li> <li><strong>Industry Knowledge:</strong> Deep understanding of selling to mid-market companies</li> <li><strong>Sales Methodologies:</strong> Experience with <strong>MEDDPICC</strong> and <strong>Command of the Message</strong> frameworks for effective deal qualification and communication.</li> </ul> <h4><strong>About LaunchDarkly:</strong></h4> <p>Modern software delivery was supposed to be the foundation for a thriving digital business but reality has proven otherwise. Slow, inefficient development cycles, costly outages, and fragmented customer experiences are preventing developers from building their best software. The LaunchDarkly platform helps developers innovate on new features faster while protecting them with a safety valve to instantly rewind when things go wrong. Developers can target product experiences to any customer segment and maximize the business impact of every feature. And by gradually rolling out new application components, they escape nightmare "big-bang" technology migrations.&nbsp;</p> <p>The LaunchDarkly platform was built to guide engineers to the next frontier of DevOps by:</p> <ul> <li>Improving the velocity and stability of software releases, without the fear of end customer outages</li> <li>Delivering targeted experiences by easily personalizing features to customer cohorts</li> <li>Maximizing the business impact of every feature through the ability to experiment and optimize</li> <li>Coordinating the release and optimization of software to provide consistent experiences across mobile platforms and device types</li> <li>Improving the effectiveness and productivity of engineering teams, by providing insights into engineering cadence and stability</li> </ul> <p>At LaunchDarkly, we believe in the power of teams. We're building a team that is humble, open, collaborative, respectful and kind. We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.</p> <p class="p1"><span class="s1"><strong>Do you need a disability accommodation?</strong></span></p> <p class="p1">Fill out this&nbsp;<a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdYb_7upYMtdRVXzvXGHGfQw0pU2FNma-6Rwp-I6NjKm7SYNw/viewform"><span class="s2">accommodations request form</span></a>&nbsp;and someone from our People Operations team will contact you for assistance.&nbsp;</p> <p class="p1"><strong>Your safety matters to us.</strong> To protect yourself from potential scams, LaunchDarkly recruiters will only contact you from <a href="https://launchdarkly.slack.com/team/UKEE4GBS6" target="_blank">@LaunchDarkly</a>.com email addresses or via LinkedIn from "Verified Recruiter" accounts.<strong> </strong>Be cautious of emails from other domains.&nbsp; Legitimate LaunchDarkly recruiters will never ask for money, fees, or banking information before making a job offer. LaunchDarkly will never make a job offer without conducting a formal interview process. Our interview process does not involve asking detailed questions by email. If you are ever unsure about a communication that you receive, don't click any links—visit <a href="https://launchdarkly.com/careers/" target="_blank">Careers | LaunchDarkly</a>&nbsp; directly for confirmed job openings and links to apply.<br><br>Please notify us of any fraudulent representation by sending an email to <a href="mailto:careers@launchdarkly.com" target="_blank">careers@launchdarkly.com</a>.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p>

jobs.title: Customer Experience Manager
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Alma is on a mission to simplify access to high-quality, affordable mental health care. We do this by making it easy and financially rewarding for therapists to accept insurance and offer in-network care. When a provider joins Alma, they gain access to a suite of tools that not only help them better run their business, but also grow it sustainably and develop as a provider. Alma is available in all 50 states, with over 20,000 therapists in our growing network. Anyone looking for a therapist can browse Alma’s free directory. Alma has raised $220.5M in funding from Insight Partners, Optum Ventures, Tusk Venture Partners, Primary Venture Partners, First Round Capital, Sound Ventures, BoxGroup, Cigna Ventures, and Rainfall Ventures. Alma was also named one of Inc’s Best Workplaces in 2022 and 2023.</span></p> <div class="c-message__content c-message__content--feature_sonic_inputs" data-qa="message_content"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://helloalma.com/" target="_blank">Website</a></span></div> <div class="c-message__content c-message__content--feature_sonic_inputs" data-qa="message_content"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://boards.greenhouse.io/alma" target="_blank">Job Board</a></span></div> <div class="c-message__content c-message__content--feature_sonic_inputs" data-qa="message_content"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/1cg1oEuMmxHsRw_45o0pANQycrwKJjub3_EdQDtEnrAc/edit" target="_blank">Values</a></span></div> <div class="c-message__content c-message__content--feature_sonic_inputs" data-qa="message_content"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-BIGrWstawQLTr8aFmmbjMXBA4YaYsVK/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank">Candidate Interview Guide&nbsp;</a></span></div> <div class="c-message__content c-message__content--feature_sonic_inputs" data-qa="message_content">&nbsp;</div> <div class="c-message__content c-message__content--feature_sonic_inputs" data-qa="message_content"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">---</span></div> <div class="c-message__content c-message__content--feature_sonic_inputs" data-qa="message_content">&nbsp;</div></div><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Customer Experience Manager&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>As a Customer Experience (CX) Manager at Alma, you will lead a team of associates and specialists through our next stage of growth, as we scale and evolve into a best-in-class service for our network of providers and their clients. You will equip and empower them to deliver customer-centric support at every touchpoint, through complex product issues (particularly, insurance and billing related) and elevate their insights cross-functionally— across Product, Design, and Marketing—to drive continuous improvement of our products and services.</p> <p>​A successful candidate should have a demonstrated ability to lead teams through ambiguity in regulated, complex environments and be extremely customer-focused.</p> <p><strong>What you’ll do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead, motivate, and enable strong team performance and quality standards—including productivity, reliability, and customer satisfaction— while supporting operational efficiency and cost targets.</li> <li>Leverage customer and team performance data to identify actionable insights and improvement opportunities.</li> <li>Partner with Customer Experience leadership to identify operational bottlenecks and trends.</li> <li>Translate complex quantitative data (team performance metrics, WFM metrics, and customer trends, etc) to make impact-driven recommendations for improvement and optimization.</li> <li>Collaborate with supporting CX Teams (P&amp;C, Quality Assurance, Ops, etc) to surface qualitative and quantitative trends to enable the CX Delivery Team to provide an exceptional experience to providers and clients.</li> <li>Define high standards of quality and equip and empower the team to deliver on those standards.</li> <li>Create and foster team engagement initiatives that are inclusive and growth-oriented.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who you are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>You have 3-5 years of work experience in operations, customer experience, or customer success, at a startup or business that is operating at scale with live support channels.</li> <li>You have 2-4 years of people management experience, managing teams of 15+ compromised of non-exempt and exempt direct reports. You have experience navigating the full spectrum of performance management — from setting clear expectations and delivering ongoing feedback to supporting employees through formal improvement processes and difficult conversations.</li> <li>You are data-driven, with experience in structuring and interpreting data (using tools like Google Sheets, Looker, Metabase, and other analytics tools) to spot trends and inform strategic decisions.</li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Benefits:</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">We’re a remote-first company</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Health insurance plans through Aetna (medical and dental) and MetLife (vision), including FSA and HSA plans</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">401K plan (ADP)</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Lifestyle Spending Account for health, wellness, and family care</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Monthly co-working space membership stipend</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Monthly work-from-home stipend</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Financial wellness benefits through Northstar</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Pet discount program through United Pet Care</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Financial perks and rewards through PerkSpot</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">EAP access through Aetna</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">One-time home office stipend to set up your home office</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Inclusive family and medical leave plans</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">12 paid holidays and 1 Alma Give Back Day</li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Flexible PTO</li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Salary Band: $100,000 - $130,000</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400; font-size: 12pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">All Alma jobs are listed on our careers page. We do not use outside applications or automated text messaging in our recruiting process. We will not ask for any sensitive financial or identification information throughout the recruiting process. Any communication during the recruitment process, including interview requests or job offers, will come directly from a recruiting team member with a helloalma.com email address.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Learn more about how Alma handles applicant data by reading Alma's&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://helloalma.com/applicant-privacy-policy/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://helloalma.com/applicant-privacy-policy/" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.</span></p></div>

jobs.title: Onboarding Specialist (French Speaking)
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><em>At Klaviyo, we value the unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives each Klaviyo (we call ourselves Klaviyos) brings to our workplace each and every day. We believe everyone deserves a fair shot at success and appreciate the experiences each person brings beyond the traditional job requirements. If you’re a close but not exact match with the description, we hope you’ll still consider applying. Want to learn more about life at Klaviyo? Visit <a class="_ymio1r31 _ypr0glyw _zcxs1o36 _mizu194a _1ah3dkaa _ra3xnqa1 _128mdkaa _1cvmnqa1 _4davt94y _4bfu18uv _1hms8stv _ajmmnqa1 _vchhusvi _kqswh2mm _ect4ttxp _syaz13af _1a3b18uv _4fpr8stv _5goinqa1 _f8pj13af _9oik18uv _1bnxglyw _jf4cnqa1 _30l313af _1nrm18uv _c2waglyw _1iohnqa1 _9h8h12zz _10531ra0 _1ien1ra0 _n0fx1ra0 _1vhv17z1" href="http://klaviyo.com/careers" data-renderer-mark="true">klaviyo.com/careers</a>&nbsp;to see how we empower creators to own their own destiny.</em></p></div><h1 data-section-id="s0ohvw" data-start="253" data-end="304"><strong data-start="255" data-end="302">Onboarding Specialist (French Speaking)</strong></h1> <h2 data-section-id="1j99pbb" data-start="346" data-end="368"><strong data-start="349" data-end="366">About Klaviyo</strong></h2> <p data-start="369" data-end="661">At Klaviyo, we believe businesses should own their growth. Our platform powers smarter digital relationships by combining marketing automation, analytics, and customer data into one place. We’re building a future where every customer interaction feels personal—and we’re just getting started.</p> <h2 data-section-id="1l3goxx" data-start="668" data-end="691"><strong data-start="671" data-end="689">About the Role</strong></h2> <p data-start="692" data-end="973">Onboarding Specialists at Klaviyo play a critical role in setting our customers up for long-term success. As the first point of contact post-sale, you’ll guide new customers through their first 30–90 days, helping them successfully implement Klaviyo and achieve fast time-to-value.</p> <p data-start="975" data-end="1176">You’ll act as a trusted advisor—combining project management, product expertise, and strategic thinking to drive product adoption, reduce friction, and build strong customer relationships from day one.</p> <h2 data-section-id="1n4ueij" data-start="1183" data-end="1220"><strong data-start="1186" data-end="1218">How You’ll Make a Difference</strong></h2> <ul data-start="1221" data-end="2126"> <li data-section-id="ykqjdz" data-start="1221" data-end="1353">Own a portfolio of new customers from post-sale through successful go-live, managing multiple onboarding journeys simultaneously</li> <li data-section-id="hofu5y" data-start="1354" data-end="1449">Design and execute tailored onboarding plans aligned to each customer’s goals and use cases</li> <li data-section-id="ormni5" data-start="1450" data-end="1552">Guide customers through platform setup, configuration, testing, and early performance optimization</li> <li data-section-id="10rxoyy" data-start="1553" data-end="1687">Provide proactive, 1:1 support across both technical and non-technical topics (e.g., deliverability, campaign setup, integrations)</li> <li data-section-id="v5yrqh" data-start="1688" data-end="1783">Track onboarding progress, ensuring milestones are met and holding stakeholders accountable</li> <li data-section-id="15fhofi" data-start="1784" data-end="1881">Monitor onboarding health metrics to identify risks early and take action to improve outcomes</li> <li data-section-id="1w3i5l3" data-start="1882" data-end="2012">Partner cross-functionally with Sales, Support, and Product teams to resolve issues and deliver a seamless customer experience</li> <li data-section-id="fy0fyt" data-start="2013" data-end="2126">Act as a trusted advisor, helping customers build a strong foundation for their marketing and growth strategy</li> </ul> <h2 data-section-id="1s4w0kl" data-start="2133" data-end="2159"><strong data-start="2136" data-end="2157">What You’ll Bring</strong></h2> <ul data-start="2160" data-end="2859"> <li data-section-id="arfxvt" data-start="2160" data-end="2245">2–3+ years of experience in Customer Success, Onboarding, or Implementation roles</li> <li data-section-id="m09f4y" data-start="2246" data-end="2334">Fluent French and English</li> <li data-section-id="m09f4y" data-start="2246" data-end="2334">Proven ability to manage multiple customer relationships and projects simultaneously</li> <li data-section-id="kh7div" data-start="2335" data-end="2433">Strong project management and organizational skills, with a track record of delivering on time</li> <li data-section-id="1evqx45" data-start="2434" data-end="2549">Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain complex concepts clearly and influence stakeholders</li> <li data-section-id="v72qyh" data-start="2550" data-end="2610">Analytical mindset with strong problem-solving abilities</li> <li data-section-id="borib9" data-start="2611" data-end="2705">Ability to manage customer expectations and navigate ambiguity in a fast-paced environment</li> <li data-section-id="136846m" data-start="2706" data-end="2793">Experience working with CRM or customer success tools (e.g., Salesforce, Gainsight)</li> <li data-section-id="1wdy22s" data-start="2794" data-end="2859">Comfortable learning and adapting to new technologies quickly</li> </ul> <h2 data-section-id="16ujpid" data-start="2866" data-end="2887"><strong data-start="2869" data-end="2885">Nice to Have</strong></h2> <ul data-start="2888" data-end="3128"> <li data-section-id="1w7nwiu" data-start="2888" data-end="2973">Experience in marketing technology, email/SMS platforms, or e-commerce ecosystems</li> <li data-section-id="22orhd" data-start="2974" data-end="3053">Experience advising customers on marketing strategies or campaign execution</li> <li data-section-id="1jcph83" data-start="3054" data-end="3128">Familiarity with data analysis, reporting, or performance optimization</li> </ul> <h2 data-section-id="qvddca" data-start="3135" data-end="3167"><strong data-start="3138" data-end="3165">AI &amp; Innovation Mindset</strong></h2> <p data-start="3168" data-end="3419">At Klaviyo, we’re investing heavily in AI to enhance both our product and how we work. We’re looking for candidates who are <strong data-start="3292" data-end="3338">curious and proactive about using AI tools</strong> to improve efficiency, scale their impact, and deliver better customer outcomes.</p> <ul data-start="3421" data-end="3810"> <li data-section-id="vpt5ff" data-start="3421" data-end="3590">Experience using AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, automation tools, or similar) to streamline workflows, improve communication, or enhance customer delivery is highly valued</li> <li data-section-id="6kkkzg" data-start="3591" data-end="3702">Demonstrated ability (or strong interest) in adopting new technologies to work smarter and more efficiently</li> <li data-section-id="1attzeo" data-start="3703" data-end="3810">A mindset focused on continuous improvement, experimentation, and leveraging AI to drive better results</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Hybrid&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We use Covey as part of our hiring and / or promotional process. For jobs or candidates in NYC, certain features may qualify it as an AEDT. As part of the evaluation process we provide Covey with job requirements and candidate submitted applications. We began using <a href="https://getcovey.com/product/covey-scout-inbound">Covey Scout for Inbound</a> on April 3, 2025.</p> <p>Please see the independent bias audit report covering our use of Covey <a style="text-decoration: underline;" href="https://getcovey.com/nyc-local-law-144">here</a></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Our salary range reflects the cost of labour in the country where the job post is advertised. The base salary offered for this position is determined by several factors, including the applicant’s job-related skills, relevant experience, education or training, and work location.</p> <p>In addition to base salary, our total compensation package may include participation in the company’s annual cash bonus plan, variable compensation (OTE) for sales and customer success roles, equity, sign-on payments, and a comprehensive range of health, welfare, and wellbeing benefits based on eligibility.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your recruiter can provide more details about the specific salary/OTE&nbsp; range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Base Pay Range in Local Currency:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>€44.000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>€66.000 EUR</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>This role may require up to 10% travel for purposes such as new hire onboarding, client or partner work if applicable, team meetings, and industry events. Travel is coordinated in advance.</em></p> <p><strong>Get to Know Klaviyo</strong></p> <p>We’re Klaviyo (pronounced clay-vee-oh). We empower creators to own their destiny by making first-party data accessible and actionable like never before. We see limitless potential for the technology we’re developing to nurture personalized experiences in ecommerce and beyond. To reach our goals, we need our own crew of remarkable creators—ambitious and collaborative teammates who stay focused on our north star: delighting our customers. If you’re ready to do the best work of your career, where you’ll be welcomed as your whole self from day one and supported with generous benefits, we hope you’ll join us.</p> <p><em>AI fluency at Klaviyo includes responsible use of AI (including privacy, security, bias awareness, and human-in-the-loop). We provide accommodations as needed.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>By participating in Klaviyo’s interview process, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and will adhere to our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw0auUcRqeYRczM9UoXAKldj">Guidelines for using AI in the Klaviyo interview Process</a>. For more information about how we process your personal data, see our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw1axMoReIM1qwTbmaPcLI_b">Job Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.<br></em></p> <p><em>Klaviyo is committed to a policy of equal opportunity and non-discrimination. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, ethnicity, citizenship, national origin, color, religion or religious creed, age, sex (including pregnancy), gender identity, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, veteran or active military status, marital status, criminal record, genetics, retaliation, sexual harassment or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.</em></p> <div id="1737752197.414839" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737752197.414839"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><em data-stringify-type="italic">IMPORTANT NOTICE: Our company takes the security and privacy of job applicants very seriously. We will never ask for payment, bank details, or personal financial information as part of the application process. All our legitimate job postings can be found on our official career site. Please be cautious of job offers that come from non-company email addresses (@klaviyo.com), instant messaging platforms, or unsolicited calls.</em></div> <div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">By clicking "Submit Application" you consent to Klaviyo processing your Personal Data in accordance with our Job Applicant Privacy Notice.&nbsp; If you do not wish for Klaviyo to process your Personal Data, please do not submit an application.<em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp; </em></strong><em data-stringify-type="italic">You can find our Job Applicant Privacy Notice&nbsp;</em><em data-stringify-type="italic"><a class="c-link" href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" data-sk="tooltip_parent">here</a></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp;and <a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/fr/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice">here</a> (FR).</em></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div id="1737477146.268809" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737477146.268809"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--above"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__left">&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div></div>

jobs.title: Base Optimization Specialist
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Airtable is the no-code app platform that empowers people closest to the work to accelerate their most critical business processes. More than 500,000 organizations, including 80% of the Fortune 100, rely on Airtable to transform how work gets done.</p></div><p>Airtable's Ask an Expert function works directly with customers via live calls to assess, restructure, and optimize how they've built on the platform. Sometimes that means resolving architectural limitations in a customer's current environment. Sometimes it means showing them what's possible with capabilities they haven't discovered yet, from AI and automations to interfaces and integrations. We meet customers where they are and help them take the next step.</p> <p><strong>What you'll do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Conduct customer calls to diagnose structural and architectural issues in how customers have built their Airtable environments. You'll assess data modeling, linked record strategy, automation design, interface configuration, and identify where the architecture is limiting the customer's outcomes.</li> <li>Restructure and rebuild. You won't just advise, you'll get into the base and demonstrate better alternatives. Optimization at Airtable means reshaping how a customer's environment is built so it scales, performs, and unlocks capabilities they couldn't access before.</li> <li>Frame every recommendation around business impact. Customers need to understand why a restructured base matters to their workflow, not just what changed. You connect architectural decisions to the outcomes their team cares about.</li> <li>Identify opportunities to expand how customers use the platform, including automation workflows, interfaces for different user personas, and AI capabilities where they add value to the restructured environment.</li> <li>Surface patterns in which customers consistently outgrow their initial architecture and feed that signal back to product, engineering, and the broader support organization.</li> <li>Stay current on platform evolution, particularly around AI capabilities, automation architecture, and integration patterns, so your recommendations reflect what the platform can do today.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who you are</strong></p> <ul> <li>You're a builder with an optimization mindset. You look at a messy database and see the clean architecture underneath it. You understand relational data modeling and can restructure a customer's environment with purpose, not just tidiness.</li> <li>You've worked in a consultative, customer-facing technical role in B2B SaaS, whether that's solutions consulting, technical support, customer engineering, or similar. You're comfortable leading a call, diagnosing a problem live, and walking a customer through the fix.</li> <li>You use AI in your own work to accelerate research, prototype solutions, and move faster through unfamiliar problems.</li> <li>You're a clear communicator who can adjust their explanations to a non-technical or a highly technical stakeholder on why their single-table design is limiting them and what linked records would unlock, without making them feel like they built it wrong.</li> <li>You're naturally curious about how people build things and why they make the choices they do. You ask good questions before you start recommending changes.</li> <li>You have experience with relational databases, automation logic, and workflow design. Familiarity with APIs, webhooks, and scripting is a plus.</li> </ul> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Airtable, we embrace diversity and strive to create a workplace where everyone has an equal opportunity to thrive. We welcome people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities, and perspectives. We strive for Airtable to be a pleasant and supportive place to work, and to attract and retain a diverse team of talented people.&nbsp; We take great pride in holding everyone accountable for treating each other with dignity and respect.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Airtable is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodation to individuals with disabilities. If you have a medical condition or disability which inhibits your ability to complete any part of the application process, please complete our </span><a href="https://airtable.com/shrq13fCV8h1sx2t8"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Accommodations Request Form</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">and let us know how we may assist you.</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><hr> <p>Compensation awarded to successful candidates will vary based on their work location, relevant skills, and experience.</p></div><div class="title">For work locations in London (United Kingdom), the on-target earning range for this role is:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>£61,100</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>£75,200 GBP</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Please see our Privacy Notice for details regarding Airtable’s collection and use of personal data relating to the application and recruitment process by clicking <a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fKEf0G59m8RT2ZaOJyxoqQ3kW3oUaxhZ/view" target="_blank">here</a>.<br><br>For applicants that live in or have a link to Australia, please see this <a href="https://www.airtable.com/company/job-application-privacy-statement" target="_blank">Privacy Collection Statement</a> for details regarding Airtable's collection and use of personal data relating to the application and recruitment process.</p> <p>🔒 <strong>Stay Safe from Job Scams</strong><br>All official Airtable communication will come from an <strong>@airtable.com</strong> email address. We will never ask you to share sensitive information or purchase equipment during the hiring process. If in doubt, contact us at <a href="mailto:hr@airtable.com">hr@airtable.com</a>. Learn more about avoiding job scams <a href="https://consumer.ftc.gov/consumer-alerts/2022/05/want-work-home-spot-scams-first">here</a>.</p></div>

jobs.title: Client Services Data Analyst
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Fastly helps people stay better connected with the things they love. Fastly’s edge cloud platform enables customers to create great digital experiences quickly, securely, and reliably by processing, serving, and securing our customers’ applications as close to their end-users as possible — at the edge of the Internet. The platform is designed to take advantage of the modern internet, to be programmable, and to support agile software development. Fastly’s customers include many of the world’s most prominent companies, including GitHub, Yelp, Paramount, and JetBlue.</p> <p>We're building a more trustworthy Internet. Come join us.</p></div><h1>Client Services Data Analyst</h1> <p>As an Associate Data Analyst for Client Services, you will be the strategic data partner for Fastly’s global Business Analytics team. You won’t just build reports; you will own the data architecture, visualization, and deep-dive analysis that drives the success of our Client Services (CS) organization.</p> <p>This is a high-autonomy, Individual Contributor role designed for an analyst who thrives on solving complex data challenges across global time zones. You will serve the critical reporting needs of our Account Managers, Support, and Professional Services teams while acting as a consultant to distill complex ideas into actionable business recommendations. We are looking for a "scrappy" problem-solver who takes ownership of data integrity and proactively finds opportunities to optimize our service delivery.</p> <h3><strong><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Strategic Performance Insights: Own the tracking, reporting, and analysis of Client Services activities. You will lead the development and automation of regular insights that move the needle on customer health and retention.</p> </li> <li> <p>Advanced Data Extraction: Write, optimize, and execute complex SQL queries. You will be responsible for manipulating customer and business data from across our tech stack to uncover hidden trends.</p> </li> <li> <p>Consultative Collaboration: Act as a data consultant for cross-functional partners. You will translate non-technical business requirements into customized technical queries and dashboards.</p> </li> <li> <p>Global Operational Excellence: Operate effectively within a global team, ensuring seamless asynchronous collaboration and high-quality hand-offs with US-based partners across a 12-hour time difference.</p> </li> <li> <p>Technical Ownership &amp; Infrastructure: Proactively assist in maintaining and optimizing our data infrastructure (BigQuery/Looker). You will identify and fix pipeline or logic gaps before they impact stakeholders.</p> </li> <li> <p>Process Scalability: Develop repeatable frameworks and automated processes to handle common analysis requests, increasing team efficiency and reducing manual toil.</p> </li> <li> <p>Data Quality Guardianship: Regularly audit data outputs for anomalies. You will uphold the "Gold Standard" of data quality, ensuring our leadership team has 100% trust in the metrics you provide.</p> </li> </ul> <h3><strong><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Proven B2B Expertise: Significant experience in B2B business analytics best practices, with hands-on mastery of Salesforce (experience with Gainsight or Zendesk is a major plus).</p> </li> <li> <p>Technical Mastery: Advanced proficiency in SQL and hands-on experience with modern data warehousing and BI tools, specifically Google BigQuery and Looker.</p> </li> <li> <p>Lifecycle &amp; Retention Logic: A deep understanding of how to analyze customer lifecycle, retention, and account health metrics in a SaaS/Infrastructure environment.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strategic Segmentation: Experience building advanced customer segments and target audiences based on behavioral and financial analysis.</p> </li> <li> <p>High-Autonomy Relationship Building: The ability to build trusted relationships with global stakeholders.</p> </li> <li> <p>Distilled Communication: A communication style capable of taking "noisy" data and turning it into a clear, logical story for business stakeholders.</p> </li> <li> <p>Education: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience in a highly analytical field.</p> </li> </ul> <h3><strong><strong>We’ll be super impressed if you have:</strong></strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Experience with dbt and version control systems like Git.</p> </li> <li> <p>Knowledge of statistical programming languages such as Python or R.</p> </li> <li> <p>Direct experience with Customer Success Platform implementation or advanced data management.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience working in a global remote-office environment with a 10+ hour time difference.</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Work Hours:</p> <ul> <li> <p>This position will require you to be available 9:30 pm-6:30 am (IST)</p> </li> </ul> <p>Work Location(s) &amp; Travel Requirements:<br>This position is open to the following preferred office locations:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Pune, India</p> </li> </ul> <p>Fastly currently embraces a largely hybrid model for most roles which allows employees flexibility to split their time between the office and home.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Salary:</p> <p>The estimated salary range for this position is 18 lakh to 20 lakh plus bonus and benefits.</p> <p>Starting salary may vary based on permissible, non-discriminatory factors such as experience, skills, qualifications, and location.</p> <p>This role may be eligible to participate in Fastly’s equity and discretionary bonus programs.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Benefits:</p> <p>We care about you. Fastly works hard to create a positive environment for our employees, and we think your life outside of work is important too. We support our teams with great benefits that start on the first day of your employment with Fastly. Curious about our offerings?&nbsp;<br><br><br>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Why Fastly?</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p><strong>We have a huge impact.</strong>&nbsp;Fastly is a small company with a big reach. Not only do<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/customers" target="_blank">&nbsp;our customers</a>&nbsp;have a tremendous user base, but we also support a growing number of<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/open-source/" target="_blank">&nbsp;open source projects and initiatives</a>.&nbsp;Outside of code, employees are encouraged to share causes close to their heart with others so we can help lend a supportive hand.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We value diversity.</strong>&nbsp;Growing and maintaining our inclusive and diverse team matters to us. We are committed to being a company where our employees feel comfortable bringing their authentic selves to work and have the ability to be successful -- every day.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We are passionate.</strong>&nbsp;Fastly is chock full of passionate people and we’re not ‘one size fits all’. Fastly employs authors, pilots, skiers, parents (of humans and animals), makeup geeks, coffee connoisseurs, and more. We love employees for who they are and what they are passionate about.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>We’re always looking for humble, sharp, and creative folks to join the Fastly team. If you think you might be a fit please apply!</strong><strong> A fully completed application and resume or CV are required when applying.</strong></p> <p><em>All job applications must be submitted through our official careers site at </em><a href="http://www.fastly.com/careers"><em>www.fastly.com/about/careers</em></a><em>. We will never request sensitive information, such as your Social Security number, bank account or credit card information during the application process. All official communication will come from an @</em><a href="http://fastly.com"><em>fastly.com</em></a><em> or @</em><a href="http://recruiting.fastly.com"><em>recruiting.fastly.com</em></a><em> email address. </em></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Fastly is committed to ensuring equal employment opportunity and to providing employees with a safe and welcoming work environment free of discrimination and harassment. Our employment decisions are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications.</span></em><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, family or parental status, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances.</span></em></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Consistent with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) and federal or state disability laws, Fastly will provide reasonable accommodations for applicants and employees with disabilities. If reasonable accommodation is needed to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and/or to receive other benefits and privileges of employment, please contact your Recruiter, or the Fastly Employee Relations team at </span></em><a href="mailto:candidateaccommodations@fastly.com"><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">candidateaccommodations@fastly.com</span></em></a><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"> or 501-287-4901.&nbsp; </span></em></p> <p><em>Fastly collects and processes personal data submitted by job applicants in accordance with our<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/privacy" target="_blank">&nbsp;Privacy Policy</a>. Please see our<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/privacy-job-applicants" target="_blank">&nbsp;privacy notice for job applicants</a>.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Partner Account Manager, Mid-Enterprise
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><em>At Klaviyo, we value the unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives each Klaviyo (we call ourselves Klaviyos) brings to our workplace each and every day. We believe everyone deserves a fair shot at success and appreciate the experiences each person brings beyond the traditional job requirements. If you’re a close but not exact match with the description, we hope you’ll still consider applying. Want to learn more about life at Klaviyo? Visit <a class="_ymio1r31 _ypr0glyw _zcxs1o36 _mizu194a _1ah3dkaa _ra3xnqa1 _128mdkaa _1cvmnqa1 _4davt94y _4bfu18uv _1hms8stv _ajmmnqa1 _vchhusvi _kqswh2mm _ect4ttxp _syaz13af _1a3b18uv _4fpr8stv _5goinqa1 _f8pj13af _9oik18uv _1bnxglyw _jf4cnqa1 _30l313af _1nrm18uv _c2waglyw _1iohnqa1 _9h8h12zz _10531ra0 _1ien1ra0 _n0fx1ra0 _1vhv17z1" href="http://klaviyo.com/careers" data-renderer-mark="true">klaviyo.com/careers</a>&nbsp;to see how we empower creators to own their own destiny.</em></p></div><p>At Klaviyo, the partnerships team prides themselves on being marketing and product experts. As a Partner Manager II, you will be responsible for building a long term, deep, and mutually-beneficial relationship with Klaviyo’s marketing agency and systems integrator partners. You will leverage strong consultative skills to understand your partners’ business model and growth strategy so that you can identify ways Klaviyo can help them (and their clients) grow.</p> <p>In this role you are responsible for managing relationships with Klaviyo partners, articulating the value of Klaviyo, differentiating Klaviyo from other solutions, managing business development opportunities (and co-selling) to/from your partners, driving co-marketing alongside the ecosystem marketing team, acting as a thought leader in our space, and coaching your partners on how to grow their business, including their profitability, with Klaviyo.</p> <p><strong>How you'll make a difference:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Become a trusted advisor to the 30 partner relationships you manage with key leaders &amp; decision makers at these orgs + build relationships with those managing front line teams working with Klaviyo.</li> <li>Develop technical knowledge of the Klaviyo product and understand how your partners can take advance use cases to market</li> <li>Build and manage a lead referral pipeline with your partner portfolio.</li> <li>Work to understand a partner’s organization structure and business goals.</li> <li>Develop a long-term strategy with your partner to help them meet their business goals alongside Klaviyo.</li> <li>Act as a consultant to help our partners build or optimize their offerings around Klaviyo.</li> <li>Become a product expert on Klaviyo and adept at presenting how Klaviyo services and software can help a partner improve their business.</li> <li>Be comfortable operating with and exceeding revenue-focused goals.</li> <li>Bring your creative thinking, strategies, and ideas to advance Klaviyo’s values, build our culture, and execute on our vision for the future.</li> <li>Have an opportunity to own projects and collaborate with a highly driven team to create new partner enablement and process.</li> <li>Drive co-marketing with our partners.</li> <li>Travel: up to 25%, to meet and develop relationships with our agency partners / events.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who you are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Are adept at influencing and relationship building.</li> <li>Have partnerships, sales, or account management experience.</li> <li>Have largely worked on accounts in the SMB/MM/Enterprise customer segment and can thoughtfully reference those experiences and relationships.</li> <li>Learning about a new product offering excites you!</li> <li>Comfortable presenting product led discussions and demo’ing the Klaviyo product to your partner network.</li> <li>Are thoughtful, engaging, and energetic.</li> <li>Obsessed with understanding your customer or partner.</li> <li>Comfortable operating independently.</li> <li>Comfortable presenting in large groups &amp; showcasing yourself as a thought leader in our industry.</li> <li>Proactively solicit and act on feedback from your customers, partners, and peers.</li> <li>Are excited to be a part of and have an impact on a rapidly-growing, profitable startup.</li> <li>Have a positive outlook and excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li> <li>Have 3-4 years of SaaS account management, channel and/or sales experience.</li> <li>Work collaboratively with enablement, CS, Marketing and Product to introduce and educate agency partners on new enhancements to Klaviyo’s platform.</li> <li>Bring your thinking, strategies, and ideas to advance our company’s values, unique culture, and vision for the future.<br><br></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>#LI-CR1 #LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Massachusetts Applicants:<br></strong>It is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.</p> <hr> <p>Our salary range reflects the cost of labor across various U.S. geographic markets. The range displayed below reflects the minimum and maximum target salaries for the position across all our US locations. The base salary offered for this position is determined by several factors, including the applicant’s job-related skills, relevant experience, education or training, and work location.</p> <p>In addition to base salary, our total compensation package may include participation in the company’s annual cash bonus plan, variable compensation (OTE) for sales and customer success roles, equity, sign-on payments, and a comprehensive range of health, welfare, and wellbeing benefits based on eligibility.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your recruiter can provide more details about the specific salary/OTE range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Base Pay Range For US Locations:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$130,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$177,100 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>This role may require up to 10% travel for purposes such as new hire onboarding, client or partner work if applicable, team meetings, and industry events. Travel is coordinated in advance.</em></p> <p><strong>Get to Know Klaviyo</strong></p> <p>We’re Klaviyo (pronounced clay-vee-oh). We empower creators to own their destiny by making first-party data accessible and actionable like never before. We see limitless potential for the technology we’re developing to nurture personalized experiences in ecommerce and beyond. To reach our goals, we need our own crew of remarkable creators—ambitious and collaborative teammates who stay focused on our north star: delighting our customers. If you’re ready to do the best work of your career, where you’ll be welcomed as your whole self from day one and supported with generous benefits, we hope you’ll join us.</p> <p><em>AI fluency at Klaviyo includes responsible use of AI (including privacy, security, bias awareness, and human-in-the-loop). We provide accommodations as needed.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>By participating in Klaviyo’s interview process, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and will adhere to our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw0auUcRqeYRczM9UoXAKldj">Guidelines for using AI in the Klaviyo interview Process</a>. For more information about how we process your personal data, see our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw1axMoReIM1qwTbmaPcLI_b">Job Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.<br></em></p> <p><em>Klaviyo is committed to a policy of equal opportunity and non-discrimination. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, ethnicity, citizenship, national origin, color, religion or religious creed, age, sex (including pregnancy), gender identity, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, veteran or active military status, marital status, criminal record, genetics, retaliation, sexual harassment or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.</em></p> <div id="1737752197.414839" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737752197.414839"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><em data-stringify-type="italic">IMPORTANT NOTICE: Our company takes the security and privacy of job applicants very seriously. We will never ask for payment, bank details, or personal financial information as part of the application process. All our legitimate job postings can be found on our official career site. Please be cautious of job offers that come from non-company email addresses (@klaviyo.com), instant messaging platforms, or unsolicited calls.</em></div> <div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">By clicking "Submit Application" you consent to Klaviyo processing your Personal Data in accordance with our Job Applicant Privacy Notice.&nbsp; If you do not wish for Klaviyo to process your Personal Data, please do not submit an application.<em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp; </em></strong><em data-stringify-type="italic">You can find our Job Applicant Privacy Notice&nbsp;</em><em data-stringify-type="italic"><a class="c-link" href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" data-sk="tooltip_parent">here</a></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp;and <a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/fr/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice">here</a> (FR).</em></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div id="1737477146.268809" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737477146.268809"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--above"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__left">&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div></div>

The base salary offered for this position is determined by several factors, including the applicant’s job-related skills, relevant experience, education or training, and work location.</p> <p>In addition to base salary, our total compensation package may include participation in the company’s annual cash bonus plan, variable compensation (OTE) for sales and customer success roles, equity, sign-on payments, and a comprehensive range of health, welfare, and wellbeing benefits based on eligibility.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your recruiter can provide more details about the specific salary/OTE range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Base Pay Range For US Locations:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$130,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$177,100 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>This role may require up to 10% travel for purposes such as new hire onboarding, client or partner work if applicable, team meetings, and industry events. jobs.title: Partner Account Manager, Mid-Enterprise
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><em>At Klaviyo, we value the unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives each Klaviyo (we call ourselves Klaviyos) brings to our workplace each and every day. We believe everyone deserves a fair shot at success and appreciate the experiences each person brings beyond the traditional job requirements. If you’re a close but not exact match with the description, we hope you’ll still consider applying. Want to learn more about life at Klaviyo? Visit <a class="_ymio1r31 _ypr0glyw _zcxs1o36 _mizu194a _1ah3dkaa _ra3xnqa1 _128mdkaa _1cvmnqa1 _4davt94y _4bfu18uv _1hms8stv _ajmmnqa1 _vchhusvi _kqswh2mm _ect4ttxp _syaz13af _1a3b18uv _4fpr8stv _5goinqa1 _f8pj13af _9oik18uv _1bnxglyw _jf4cnqa1 _30l313af _1nrm18uv _c2waglyw _1iohnqa1 _9h8h12zz _10531ra0 _1ien1ra0 _n0fx1ra0 _1vhv17z1" href="http://klaviyo.com/careers" data-renderer-mark="true">klaviyo.com/careers</a>&nbsp;to see how we empower creators to own their own destiny.</em></p></div><p>At Klaviyo, the partnerships team prides themselves on being marketing and product experts. As a Partner Manager II, you will be responsible for building a long term, deep, and mutually-beneficial relationship with Klaviyo’s marketing agency and systems integrator partners. You will leverage strong consultative skills to understand your partners’ business model and growth strategy so that you can identify ways Klaviyo can help them (and their clients) grow.</p> <p>In this role you are responsible for managing relationships with Klaviyo partners, articulating the value of Klaviyo, differentiating Klaviyo from other solutions, managing business development opportunities (and co-selling) to/from your partners, driving co-marketing alongside the ecosystem marketing team, acting as a thought leader in our space, and coaching your partners on how to grow their business, including their profitability, with Klaviyo.</p> <p><strong>How you'll make a difference:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Become a trusted advisor to the 30 partner relationships you manage with key leaders &amp; decision makers at these orgs + build relationships with those managing front line teams working with Klaviyo.</li> <li>Develop technical knowledge of the Klaviyo product and understand how your partners can take advance use cases to market</li> <li>Build and manage a lead referral pipeline with your partner portfolio.</li> <li>Work to understand a partner’s organization structure and business goals.</li> <li>Develop a long-term strategy with your partner to help them meet their business goals alongside Klaviyo.</li> <li>Act as a consultant to help our partners build or optimize their offerings around Klaviyo.</li> <li>Become a product expert on Klaviyo and adept at presenting how Klaviyo services and software can help a partner improve their business.</li> <li>Be comfortable operating with and exceeding revenue-focused goals.</li> <li>Bring your creative thinking, strategies, and ideas to advance Klaviyo’s values, build our culture, and execute on our vision for the future.</li> <li>Have an opportunity to own projects and collaborate with a highly driven team to create new partner enablement and process.</li> <li>Drive co-marketing with our partners.</li> <li>Travel: up to 25%, to meet and develop relationships with our agency partners / events.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who you are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Are adept at influencing and relationship building.</li> <li>Have partnerships, sales, or account management experience.</li> <li>Have largely worked on accounts in the SMB/MM/Enterprise customer segment and can thoughtfully reference those experiences and relationships.</li> <li>Learning about a new product offering excites you!</li> <li>Comfortable presenting product led discussions and demo’ing the Klaviyo product to your partner network.</li> <li>Are thoughtful, engaging, and energetic.</li> <li>Obsessed with understanding your customer or partner.</li> <li>Comfortable operating independently.</li> <li>Comfortable presenting in large groups &amp; showcasing yourself as a thought leader in our industry.</li> <li>Proactively solicit and act on feedback from your customers, partners, and peers.</li> <li>Are excited to be a part of and have an impact on a rapidly-growing, profitable startup.</li> <li>Have a positive outlook and excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li> <li>Have 3-4 years of SaaS account management, channel and/or sales experience.</li> <li>Work collaboratively with enablement, CS, Marketing and Product to introduce and educate agency partners on new enhancements to Klaviyo’s platform.</li> <li>Bring your thinking, strategies, and ideas to advance our company’s values, unique culture, and vision for the future.<br><br></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>#LI-CR1 #LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Massachusetts Applicants:<br></strong>It is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.</p> <hr> <p>Our salary range reflects the cost of labor across various U.S. geographic markets. The range displayed below reflects the minimum and maximum target salaries for the position across all our US locations. The base salary offered for this position is determined by several factors, including the applicant’s job-related skills, relevant experience, education or training, and work location.</p> <p>In addition to base salary, our total compensation package may include participation in the company’s annual cash bonus plan, variable compensation (OTE) for sales and customer success roles, equity, sign-on payments, and a comprehensive range of health, welfare, and wellbeing benefits based on eligibility.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your recruiter can provide more details about the specific salary/OTE range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Base Pay Range For US Locations:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$130,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$177,100 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>This role may require up to 10% travel for purposes such as new hire onboarding, client or partner work if applicable, team meetings, and industry events. Travel is coordinated in advance.</em></p> <p><strong>Get to Know Klaviyo</strong></p> <p>We’re Klaviyo (pronounced clay-vee-oh). We empower creators to own their destiny by making first-party data accessible and actionable like never before. We see limitless potential for the technology we’re developing to nurture personalized experiences in ecommerce and beyond. To reach our goals, we need our own crew of remarkable creators—ambitious and collaborative teammates who stay focused on our north star: delighting our customers. If you’re ready to do the best work of your career, where you’ll be welcomed as your whole self from day one and supported with generous benefits, we hope you’ll join us.</p> <p><em>AI fluency at Klaviyo includes responsible use of AI (including privacy, security, bias awareness, and human-in-the-loop). We provide accommodations as needed.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>By participating in Klaviyo’s interview process, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and will adhere to our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw0auUcRqeYRczM9UoXAKldj">Guidelines for using AI in the Klaviyo interview Process</a>. For more information about how we process your personal data, see our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw1axMoReIM1qwTbmaPcLI_b">Job Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.<br></em></p> <p><em>Klaviyo is committed to a policy of equal opportunity and non-discrimination. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, ethnicity, citizenship, national origin, color, religion or religious creed, age, sex (including pregnancy), gender identity, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, veteran or active military status, marital status, criminal record, genetics, retaliation, sexual harassment or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.</em></p> <div id="1737752197.414839" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737752197.414839"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><em data-stringify-type="italic">IMPORTANT NOTICE: Our company takes the security and privacy of job applicants very seriously.
