jobs.title: Sales Operation Manager
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Fastly helps people stay better connected with the things they love. Fastly’s edge cloud platform enables customers to create great digital experiences quickly, securely, and reliably by processing, serving, and securing our customers’ applications as close to their end-users as possible — at the edge of the Internet. The platform is designed to take advantage of the modern internet, to be programmable, and to support agile software development. Fastly’s customers include many of the world’s most prominent companies, including GitHub, Yelp, Paramount, and JetBlue.</p> <p>We're building a more trustworthy Internet. Come join us.</p></div><p><strong>Sales Operation Manager</strong></p> <p>If you have a successful track record in sales operations or revenue operations, working with high-performing teams in a fast-growing environment, we wish to hear from you.</p> <p>As a Sales Operation Manager, you will be the engine behind our sales team’s efficiency and a meaningful part of the growth of the EMEA region. You will partner with Sales leadership and the Director of Strategy &amp; Operations to design sales territories, optimize the sales funnel, and provide analysis on revenue trends &amp; critical metrics.&nbsp; In addition, you will drive operational improvements in the areas of reporting, tools, process, workflow, communication, and strategy.</p> <p><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Strategic Planning: Act in partnership with senior Sales leadership and the Director of Sales Strategy &amp; Operations, in driving the annual planning process for the EMEA region. This includes head-count modelling, territory carving, and quota setting.</li> <li>Performance Analysis: Support EMEA Sales leadership to run their business effectively, including:</li> <ul> <li>Supporting Pipeline and Forecast reviews</li> <li>Develop and maintain Salesforce reports and dashboards</li> <li>Compile data analysis and insights for key sales metrics and KPIs</li> </ul> <li>Operational Excellence: Partner with the Global Sales Operations teams to identify and manage process and system improvements.Act as a power user of our CRM (Salesforce), ensuring data integrity and automating workflows to reduce "admin drag" for reps.</li> <li>Operational Front-Line Support: Provide front-line support to the EMEA Sales team and broader revenue organization to ensure the seamless execution and maintenance of the sales business.</li> <li>Cross-Functional Collaboration: Actively participate in cross-functional initiatives and partner with other teams (Marketing, Channel, Deal Desk, Finance etc) to identify and solve operational business challenges.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We're Looking For:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>3-5 years of experience in a Sales Operations or Revenue Operations role, ideally within a high-growth SaaS</li> <li>Excellent analytical, reporting, data manipulation, dashboard creation, and business intelligence skills with the ability to translate data and metrics into predictable business insights.</li> <li>Proven ability to manage and execute small regional projects, and interact effectively with cross-functional teams in order to drive operational plans for the region.</li> <li>Working knowledge of Salesforce, Clari, and other sales tools, including ZoomInfo and Outreach.</li> <li>Excellent communication skills at all levels of an organisation. Comfortable presenting findings to VPs and Directors.</li> <li>Detail oriented and highly organized with the ability to prioritize multiple deadlines simultaneously.</li> <li>Proven ability to network and build strong relationships with peers and senior leaders</li> </ul> <p><strong>We’ll be super impressed if you have experience in any of these:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with other sales tools, including 6Sense, Clari Copilor,&nbsp; BI Tools (Looker, Tableau or PowerBI) and SQL knowledge.</li> <li>Experience with building data models to define segments and target audiences based on available data&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience in the B2B sector, in a high-growth SaaS environment.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Work Hours:</strong> This position will require you to be available during core business hours.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Work Location(s) &amp; Travel Requirements:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <p>This position has one opening and can be hired in the following preferred office locations:</p> <ul> <li>London</li> </ul> <p>Fastly currently embraces a largely hybrid model for most roles, which allows employees flexibility to split their time between the office and home. &nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Benefits:&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>We care about you. Fastly works hard to create a positive environment for our employees, and we think your life outside of work is important too. We support our teams with great benefits that start on the first day of your employment with Fastly. Curious about our offerings?&nbsp;</p> <p>We offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to meet your needs. Our offerings may vary depending on the country where you work and are subject to change.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Why Fastly?</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p><strong>We have a huge impact.</strong>&nbsp;Fastly is a small company with a big reach. Not only do<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/customers" target="_blank">&nbsp;our customers</a>&nbsp;have a tremendous user base, but we also support a growing number of<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/open-source/" target="_blank">&nbsp;open source projects and initiatives</a>.&nbsp;Outside of code, employees are encouraged to share causes close to their heart with others so we can help lend a supportive hand.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We value diversity.</strong>&nbsp;Growing and maintaining our inclusive and diverse team matters to us. We are committed to being a company where our employees feel comfortable bringing their authentic selves to work and have the ability to be successful -- every day.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We are passionate.</strong>&nbsp;Fastly is chock full of passionate people and we’re not ‘one size fits all’. Fastly employs authors, pilots, skiers, parents (of humans and animals), makeup geeks, coffee connoisseurs, and more. We love employees for who they are and what they are passionate about.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>We’re always looking for humble, sharp, and creative folks to join the Fastly team. If you think you might be a fit please apply!</strong><strong> A fully completed application and resume or CV are required when applying.</strong></p> <p><em>All job applications must be submitted through our official careers site at </em><a href="http://www.fastly.com/careers"><em>www.fastly.com/about/careers</em></a><em>. We will never request sensitive information, such as your Social Security number, bank account or credit card information during the application process. All official communication will come from an @</em><a href="http://fastly.com"><em>fastly.com</em></a><em> or @</em><a href="http://recruiting.fastly.com"><em>recruiting.fastly.com</em></a><em> email address. </em></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Fastly is committed to ensuring equal employment opportunity and to providing employees with a safe and welcoming work environment free of discrimination and harassment. Our employment decisions are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications.</span></em><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"> All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, medical condition, national origin, family or parental status, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran status, race, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws, regulations and ordinances.</span></em></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Consistent with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) and federal or state disability laws, Fastly will provide reasonable accommodations for applicants and employees with disabilities. If reasonable accommodation is needed to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and/or to receive other benefits and privileges of employment, please contact your Recruiter, or the Fastly Employee Relations team at </span></em><a href="mailto:candidateaccommodations@fastly.com"><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">candidateaccommodations@fastly.com</span></em></a><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"> or 501-287-4901.&nbsp; </span></em></p> <p><em>Fastly collects and processes personal data submitted by job applicants in accordance with our<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/privacy" target="_blank">&nbsp;Privacy Policy</a>. Please see our<a class="external-link" href="https://www.fastly.com/privacy-job-applicants" target="_blank">&nbsp;privacy notice for job applicants</a>.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Customer Support Specialist
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><em>At Klaviyo, we value the unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives each Klaviyo (we call ourselves Klaviyos) brings to our workplace each and every day. We believe everyone deserves a fair shot at success and appreciate the experiences each person brings beyond the traditional job requirements. If you’re a close but not exact match with the description, we hope you’ll still consider applying. Want to learn more about life at Klaviyo? Visit <a class="_ymio1r31 _ypr0glyw _zcxs1o36 _mizu194a _1ah3dkaa _ra3xnqa1 _128mdkaa _1cvmnqa1 _4davt94y _4bfu18uv _1hms8stv _ajmmnqa1 _vchhusvi _kqswh2mm _ect4ttxp _syaz13af _1a3b18uv _4fpr8stv _5goinqa1 _f8pj13af _9oik18uv _1bnxglyw _jf4cnqa1 _30l313af _1nrm18uv _c2waglyw _1iohnqa1 _9h8h12zz _10531ra0 _1ien1ra0 _n0fx1ra0 _1vhv17z1" href="http://klaviyo.com/careers" data-renderer-mark="true">klaviyo.com/careers</a>&nbsp;to see how we empower creators to own their own destiny.</em></p></div><p>Product Experts (Customer Support Specialists) are a critical part of our future success. We take the success of our customers incredibly seriously. Our mission is to deliver exceptional assistance to our customers with the highest level of quality in both product knowledge and communication skills, and in the process, consistently meet and exceed customer expectations. We are looking for a Product Expert who is passionate about providing the best support to customers who are scaling their businesses with Klaviyo.</p> <p>We are very interested in individuals who have a track record of finding creative solutions to unique problems, who thrive in challenging situations and want to apply these skills to solve for customers using our software.</p> <p><strong>How you will make a difference:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop an in-depth knowledge of the Klaviyo platform</li> <li>Provide high-quality product support for Klaviyo customers, partnering with them to effectively resolve their issues through email, chat, and phone</li> <li>Communicate thoughtfully to provide answers to questions for both technical and non-technical end users while also supporting a wide range of technologies.</li> <li>Diagnose software issues and resolve escalated customer complaints engage using established processes</li> <li>Provide support &amp; guidance on non-technical related questions (e.g: marketing, sales, other e-commerce setup questions)</li> <li>Communicate thoughtfully and effectively with all Klaviyo customers</li> <li>Document troubleshooting and problem resolution steps.</li> <li>Transform workflows by putting AI at the center, building smarter systems and ways of working from the ground up.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>A thoughtful communicator who is excellent at communicating through a variety of channels that require both written and verbal skills.</li> <li>Passionate about creative problem solving for customers and end users</li> <li>Self-motivated, eager to learn and thrive in a collaborative environment</li> <li>Capable of adapting quickly to changing priorities</li> <li>Experience with or able to quickly pick-up: <ul> <li>Microsoft Office Suite, G-Suite, Google Sheets, PowerPoint, Zendesk, and Salesforce</li> <li>Web works, networking, and software products</li> <li>DNS, IPs and other networking concepts</li> <li>APIs</li> <li>Email marketing platforms and E-Commerce platforms</li> </ul> </li> <li>Familiar with the Klaviyo product and completing the <a href="https://academy.klaviyo.com/en-us/certificates/klaviyo-practitioner-certificate?utm_source=support_job_listing&amp;utm_medium=cross_promo&amp;utm_campaign=practitioner_cert">Klaviyo Practitioner Certificate</a> is a plus</li> <li>You’ve already experimented with AI in work or personal projects, and you’re excited to dive in and learn fast. You’re hungry to responsibly explore new AI tools and workflows, finding ways to make your work smarter and more efficient.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We use Covey as part of our hiring and / or promotional process. For jobs or candidates in NYC, certain features may qualify it as an AEDT. As part of the evaluation process we provide Covey with job requirements and candidate submitted applications. We began using <a href="https://getcovey.com/product/covey-scout-inbound">Covey Scout for Inbound</a> on April 3, 2025.</p> <p>Please see the independent bias audit report covering our use of Covey <a style="text-decoration: underline;" href="https://getcovey.com/nyc-local-law-144">here</a></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Massachusetts Applicants:<br></strong>It is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.</p> <hr> <p>Our salary range reflects the cost of labor across various U.S. geographic markets. The range displayed below reflects the minimum and maximum target salaries for the position across all our US locations. The base salary offered for this position is determined by several factors, including the applicant’s job-related skills, relevant experience, education or training, and work location.</p> <p>In addition to base salary, our total compensation package may include participation in the company’s annual cash bonus plan, variable compensation (OTE) for sales and customer success roles, equity, sign-on payments, and a comprehensive range of health, welfare, and wellbeing benefits based on eligibility.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your recruiter can provide more details about the specific salary/OTE range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Base Pay Range For US Locations:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$26.92</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$40.38 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>This role may require up to 10% travel for purposes such as new hire onboarding, client or partner work if applicable, team meetings, and industry events. Travel is coordinated in advance.</em></p> <p><strong>Get to Know Klaviyo</strong></p> <p>We’re Klaviyo (pronounced clay-vee-oh). We empower creators to own their destiny by making first-party data accessible and actionable like never before. We see limitless potential for the technology we’re developing to nurture personalized experiences in ecommerce and beyond. To reach our goals, we need our own crew of remarkable creators—ambitious and collaborative teammates who stay focused on our north star: delighting our customers. If you’re ready to do the best work of your career, where you’ll be welcomed as your whole self from day one and supported with generous benefits, we hope you’ll join us.</p> <p><em>AI fluency at Klaviyo includes responsible use of AI (including privacy, security, bias awareness, and human-in-the-loop). We provide accommodations as needed.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>By participating in Klaviyo’s interview process, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and will adhere to our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw0auUcRqeYRczM9UoXAKldj">Guidelines for using AI in the Klaviyo interview Process</a>. For more information about how we process your personal data, see our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw1axMoReIM1qwTbmaPcLI_b">Job Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.<br></em></p> <p><em>Klaviyo is committed to a policy of equal opportunity and non-discrimination. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, ethnicity, citizenship, national origin, color, religion or religious creed, age, sex (including pregnancy), gender identity, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, veteran or active military status, marital status, criminal record, genetics, retaliation, sexual harassment or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.</em></p> <div id="1737752197.414839" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737752197.414839"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><em data-stringify-type="italic">IMPORTANT NOTICE: Our company takes the security and privacy of job applicants very seriously. We will never ask for payment, bank details, or personal financial information as part of the application process. All our legitimate job postings can be found on our official career site. Please be cautious of job offers that come from non-company email addresses (@klaviyo.com), instant messaging platforms, or unsolicited calls.</em></div> <div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">By clicking "Submit Application" you consent to Klaviyo processing your Personal Data in accordance with our Job Applicant Privacy Notice.&nbsp; If you do not wish for Klaviyo to process your Personal Data, please do not submit an application.<em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp; </em></strong><em data-stringify-type="italic">You can find our Job Applicant Privacy Notice&nbsp;</em><em data-stringify-type="italic"><a class="c-link" href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" data-sk="tooltip_parent">here</a></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp;and <a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/fr/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice">here</a> (FR).</em></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div id="1737477146.268809" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737477146.268809"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--above"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__left">&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div></div>

jobs.title: Procurement Manager
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>At Braze, we have found our people. We’re a genuinely approachable, exceptionally kind, and intensely passionate crew.</p> <p>We seek to ignite that passion by setting high standards, championing teamwork, and creating work-life harmony as we collectively navigate rapid growth on a global scale while striving for greater equity and opportunity – inside and outside our organization.</p> <p>To flourish here, you must be prepared to set a high bar for yourself and those around you. There is always a way to contribute: Acting with autonomy, having accountability and being open to new perspectives are essential to our continued success.</p> <p>Our deep curiosity to learn and our eagerness to share diverse passions with others gives us balance and injects a one-of-a-kind vibrancy into our culture.</p> <p>If you are driven to solve exhilarating challenges and have a bias toward action in the face of change, you will be empowered to make a real impact here, with a sharp and passionate team at your back. If Braze sounds like a place where you can thrive, we can’t wait to meet you.</p></div><p>We are looking for an experienced, detail-oriented, and highly collaborative Procurement Manager to join our team. Reporting directly to the Senior Director of Procure-to-Pay, this position sits within the Finance Operations function. In this role, you will lead complex contract negotiations, optimize our overarching procure-to-pay operations, and directly manage a team of two individuals. We operate in a fast-paced technology environment, so strong operational experience in the SaaS industry is highly preferred.</p> <p>You will also be the primary owner from the Procurement side of our contracting and purchasing systems. We utilize Ironclad for our Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM), which is fully integrated with Coupa for our procure-to-pay workflows. A candidate with hands-on operational experience navigating and optimizing these two systems will thrive in this role.</p> <p><strong>WHAT YOU'LL DO</strong></p> <ul> <li>Team Leadership: Manage, mentor, and develop a team of procurement and contracts administration professionals, providing cross-functional guidance on purchasing workflows, negotiation strategies, operational efficiency, company policies, and career growth</li> <li>Complex Negotiations: Review, and negotiate a wide variety of commercial agreements, including SaaS agreements, Master Services Agreements (MSAs), Statements of Work (SOWs), Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs), and Data Processing Agreements (DPAs)</li> <li>System Optimization: Act as the subject matter expert for our contracting and purchasing tools. Oversee the contract workflow in Ironclad and ensure seamless integration and operational data flow with Coupa for our procure-to-pay (P2P) processes</li> <li>Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner closely with Legal, Finance, Security, and internal business stakeholders to ensure contracts and vendor purchases align with company risk tolerance, budget, and business objectives</li> <li>Process Improvement: Continuously identify opportunities to streamline both the contract lifecycle and the procurement intake process, reducing bottlenecks and improving the speed of execution without compromising on risk management or operational excellence</li> </ul> <p><strong>WHO YOU ARE</strong></p> <ul> <li>Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Supply Chain, or a related field</li> <li>Experience: 3+ years of experience in procurement, contract management, commercial operations, or a related field, with a heavy emphasis on operational workflows and negotiating complex agreements</li> <li>People Management: Proven experience directly managing and coaching direct reports, with the ability to lead professionals across both procurement and contract administration functions</li> <li>Negotiation Skills: Exceptional negotiation skills with a deep understanding of commercial legal terms, risk allocation, and standard contracting principles</li> <li>Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to translate complex legal and procurement jargon into clear, actionable business advice for stakeholders</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li>SaaS Industry Experience: Strong background working within the SaaS or software industry, with a solid understanding of software licensing, subscription models, and privacy/data security standards</li> <li>System Expertise: Hands-on, administrative-level experience with Ironclad (or a similar CLM) and Coupa (or a similar P2P system). Experience managing the integration and data mapping between the two is a massive plus</li> <li>Agility: Ability to thrive in a high-growth, fast-paced environment while managing competing priorities</li> </ul> <p><span data-sheets-root="1">For candidates based in the United States, the pay range for this position at the start of employment is expected to be between $121,100 - $130,500/year, with an expected On Target Earnings (OTE) between $134,700 - $145,000/year (including bonus or commission). Your exact offer may vary depending on multiple individualized factors, including market location, job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. In addition to cash compensation, this role qualifies for a comprehensive Total Rewards package that includes equity grants of restricted stock (RSUs) so that you will own a piece of our company.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><div class="p-rich_text_section"> <p><strong>WHAT WE OFFER<br></strong></p> <p><em>Braze benefits vary by location, and we encourage you to review our specific benefits offerings for each country </em><a href="https://www.braze.com/company/careers/how-we-hire#benefit-section"><em>here</em></a><em>. More details on benefits plans will be provided if you receive an offer of employment.</em></p> <p>From offering comprehensive benefits to fostering hybrid ways of working, we’ve got you covered so you can prioritize work-life harmony. Braze offers benefits such as:</p> <ul> <li>Competitive compensation that may include equity</li> <li>Retirement and Employee Stock Purchase Plans</li> <li>Flexible paid time off</li> <li>Comprehensive benefit plans covering medical, dental, vision, life, and disability</li> <li>Family services that include fertility benefits and equal paid parental leave</li> <li>Professional development supported by formal career pathing, learning platforms, and a yearly learning stipend</li> <li>A curated in-office employee experience, designed to foster community, team connections, and innovation</li> <li>Opportunities to give back to your community, including an annual company-wide Volunteer Week and donation matching&nbsp;</li> <li>Employee Resource Groups that provide supportive communities within Braze</li> <li>Collaborative, transparent, and fun culture recognized as a Great Place to Work®</li> </ul> <p><strong>ABOUT BRAZE<br><br></strong>Braze is the leading customer engagement platform that empowers brands to Be Absolutely Engaging.™ Braze helps brands deliver great customer experiences that drive value both for consumers and for their businesses. Built on a foundation of composable intelligence, BrazeAI™ allows marketers to combine and activate AI agents, models, and features at every touchpoint throughout the Braze Customer Engagement Platform for smarter, faster, and more meaningful customer engagement. From cross-channel messaging and journey orchestration to Al-powered decisioning and optimization, Braze enables companies to turn action into interaction through autonomous, 1:1 personalized experiences.<br><br>The company has repeatedly been recognized as a Leader in marketing technology by industry analysts, and was voted a G2 “Best of Marketing and Digital Advertising Software Product” in 2025.<br><br>Braze was also named a 2025 Best Companies To Work For by U.S. News &amp; World Report, a 2025 America’s Greatest Companies by Newsweek, and a 2025 Fortune Best Workplace in Technology™ by Great Place To Work®, among other accolades. Braze is also proudly certified as a Great Place to Work® in the U.S., the UK, Australia, and Singapore.<br><br>The company is headquartered in New York with offices in Austin, Berlin, Bucharest, Chicago, Dubai, Jakarta, London, Paris, San Francisco, São Paulo, Singapore, Seoul, Sydney and Tokyo.</p> <strong>BRAZE IS AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER</strong> <p>At Braze, we strive to create equitable growth and opportunities inside and outside the organization.</p> <p>Building meaningful connections is at the heart of everything we do, and that includes our recruiting practices. We're committed to offering all candidates a fair, accessible, and inclusive experience – regardless of age, color, disability, gender identity, marital status, maternity, national origin, pregnancy, race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, or status as a protected veteran. When applying and interviewing with Braze, we want you to feel comfortable showcasing what makes you <em>you</em>.</p> <p>We know that sometimes different circumstances can lead talented people to hesitate to apply for a role unless they meet 100% of the criteria. If this sounds familiar, we encourage you to apply, as we’d love to meet you.</p> <em>Please see our</em><a href="https://www.braze.com/company/legal/privacy-policy-job-candidates"><em> </em><em>Candidate Privacy Policy</em></a><em> for more information on how Braze processes your personal information during the recruitment process and, if applicable based on your location, how you can exercise any privacy rights.</em></div></div>

jobs.title: Commercial AE Customer Growth
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><em>At Klaviyo, we value the unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives each Klaviyo (we call ourselves Klaviyos) brings to our workplace each and every day. We believe everyone deserves a fair shot at success and appreciate the experiences each person brings beyond the traditional job requirements. If you’re a close but not exact match with the description, we hope you’ll still consider applying. Want to learn more about life at Klaviyo? Visit <a class="_ymio1r31 _ypr0glyw _zcxs1o36 _mizu194a _1ah3dkaa _ra3xnqa1 _128mdkaa _1cvmnqa1 _4davt94y _4bfu18uv _1hms8stv _ajmmnqa1 _vchhusvi _kqswh2mm _ect4ttxp _syaz13af _1a3b18uv _4fpr8stv _5goinqa1 _f8pj13af _9oik18uv _1bnxglyw _jf4cnqa1 _30l313af _1nrm18uv _c2waglyw _1iohnqa1 _9h8h12zz _10531ra0 _1ien1ra0 _n0fx1ra0 _1vhv17z1" href="http://klaviyo.com/careers" data-renderer-mark="true">klaviyo.com/careers</a>&nbsp;to see how we empower creators to own their own destiny.</em></p></div><h1><strong>Account Executive — Customer Growth (ANZ)</strong></h1> <p>Account Executives at Klaviyo are given a tremendous opportunity to have a huge impact on Klaviyo's customers, on Klaviyo's trajectory, and as a result, on themselves. At Klaviyo, AEs pride themselves on being product experts who focus on expanding the right customers in the right way — driving genuine platform adoption and long-term value.</p> <p>CG AEs own the full expansion sales cycle with existing Klaviyo customers — from identifying whitespace to running discovery, demo, and driving the buying process to close — across Klaviyo's growing product suite including Marketing, K:Service (Customer Hub, Customer Agent, Helpdesk), SMS, and Analytics.</p> <p>The best CG AEs are trusted advisors to their customers, able to close a high percentage of their opportunities, forecast with accuracy, and proactively manage and grow their book of business over time.</p> <h2><strong>How You'll Make a Difference</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Grow Klaviyo's revenue within our existing ANZ customer base by introducing and closing new products across Marketing, K:Service, SMS, and Analytics</li> <li>Actively manage your pipeline and develop a strategy for long-term sustained territory growth</li> <li>Support the success of your peers</li> <li>Exhibit Klaviyo's values of accountability and effort</li> <li>Transform workflows by putting AI at the center, building smarter systems and ways of working from the ground up</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Who You Are</strong></h2> <ul> <li>2+ years carrying revenue quota with consistent overachievement, ideally selling MarTech or SaaS solutions into an existing customer base — or a Customer Success background with a strong commercial track record and a genuine appetite to move into a closing role</li> <li>Experience selling platform or multi-product solutions — you understand how to map customer needs to a broader product suite, not just close a single SKU</li> <li>Familiarity with Customer Support SaaS platforms (e.g. Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk) and/or SMS marketing is a bonus — but not a requirement</li> <li>Experience selling to Marketing, CX, or Operations personas and solid knowledge of the Ecommerce / Retail / Brands domain</li> <li>A strategic seller — able to map customer goals to multi-product solutions, build consensus across stakeholders, and manage longer, more complex buying cycles</li> <li>Proven ability to work cross-functionally with CSMs, Partners, and internal stakeholders to drive deals and deliver customer outcomes</li> <li>Excited, motivated, and inspired by exceeding goals</li> <li>Embrace failure as feedback — not afraid to hear no, and rigorous in your pursuit of improvement</li> <li>Strong growth mindset with a bias toward action</li> <li>Adept at influencing and relationship building; encouraging, engaging, and energetic with your team</li> <li>You've already experimented with AI in work or personal projects, and you're excited to dive in and learn fast — finding ways to make your work smarter and more efficient</li> <li>Full authorisation to work in Australia without any restrictions</li> <li>Based in Sydney and able to work from our Sydney office a minimum of 3 days per week</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Klaviyo in APAC:</strong></h2> <p>We are starting small but have big plans for Klaviyo in APAC. Our Sydney team began to take shape throughout 2022 and has now built out our go to market teams in sales, customer success, partnerships, marketing, recruiting and product support. As the team grows we will see a continued expansion of Klaviyo’s customer base and the building of a fantastic working culture in line with what we see elsewhere in Klaviyo but with its own local identity within our Sydney based team. This is your unique opportunity to join us at an very early stage and help to shape our future Klaviyo in APAC.</p> <p>One of our values as a company is ‘always learning’ and you can feel that in APAC. People are looking to grow and develop and Klaviyo provides a great platform to do so. As we are still relatively early in our journey in APAC this means there is a lot of headroom to grow and develop within your role - we are looking for the leaders of the future. At Klaviyo generally managers are often promoted up into their roles and people are regularly being promoted or moving into new functional areas - it really is an education through experience here.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We use Covey as part of our hiring and / or promotional process. For jobs or candidates in NYC, certain features may qualify it as an AEDT. As part of the evaluation process we provide Covey with job requirements and candidate submitted applications. We began using<a href="https://getcovey.com/product/covey-scout-inbound"> Covey Scout for Inbound</a> on April 3, 2025.</p> <p>Please see the independent bias audit report covering our use of Covey<a href="https://getcovey.com/nyc-local-law-144"> here</a></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><br><br></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Our salary range reflects the cost of labour in the country where the job post is advertised. The base salary offered for this position is determined by several factors, including the applicant’s job-related skills, relevant experience, education or training, and work location.</p> <p>In addition to base salary, our total compensation package may include participation in the company’s annual cash bonus plan, variable compensation (OTE) for sales and customer success roles, equity, sign-on payments, and a comprehensive range of health, welfare, and wellbeing benefits based on eligibility.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your recruiter can provide more details about the specific salary/OTE&nbsp; range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Base Pay Range in Local Currency:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$100,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$100,000 AUD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>This role may require up to 10% travel for purposes such as new hire onboarding, client or partner work if applicable, team meetings, and industry events. Travel is coordinated in advance.</em></p> <p><strong>Get to Know Klaviyo</strong></p> <p>We’re Klaviyo (pronounced clay-vee-oh). We empower creators to own their destiny by making first-party data accessible and actionable like never before. We see limitless potential for the technology we’re developing to nurture personalized experiences in ecommerce and beyond. To reach our goals, we need our own crew of remarkable creators—ambitious and collaborative teammates who stay focused on our north star: delighting our customers. If you’re ready to do the best work of your career, where you’ll be welcomed as your whole self from day one and supported with generous benefits, we hope you’ll join us.</p> <p><em>AI fluency at Klaviyo includes responsible use of AI (including privacy, security, bias awareness, and human-in-the-loop). We provide accommodations as needed.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>By participating in Klaviyo’s interview process, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and will adhere to our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw0auUcRqeYRczM9UoXAKldj">Guidelines for using AI in the Klaviyo interview Process</a>. For more information about how we process your personal data, see our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw1axMoReIM1qwTbmaPcLI_b">Job Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.<br></em></p> <p><em>Klaviyo is committed to a policy of equal opportunity and non-discrimination. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, ethnicity, citizenship, national origin, color, religion or religious creed, age, sex (including pregnancy), gender identity, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, veteran or active military status, marital status, criminal record, genetics, retaliation, sexual harassment or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.</em></p> <div id="1737752197.414839" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737752197.414839"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><em data-stringify-type="italic">IMPORTANT NOTICE: Our company takes the security and privacy of job applicants very seriously. We will never ask for payment, bank details, or personal financial information as part of the application process. All our legitimate job postings can be found on our official career site. Please be cautious of job offers that come from non-company email addresses (@klaviyo.com), instant messaging platforms, or unsolicited calls.</em></div> <div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">By clicking "Submit Application" you consent to Klaviyo processing your Personal Data in accordance with our Job Applicant Privacy Notice.&nbsp; If you do not wish for Klaviyo to process your Personal Data, please do not submit an application.<em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp; </em></strong><em data-stringify-type="italic">You can find our Job Applicant Privacy Notice&nbsp;</em><em data-stringify-type="italic"><a class="c-link" href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" data-sk="tooltip_parent">here</a></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp;and <a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/fr/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice">here</a> (FR).</em></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div id="1737477146.268809" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737477146.268809"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--above"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__left">&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div></div>

jobs.title: Workplace Experience Receptionist
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>At Braze, we have found our people. We’re a genuinely approachable, exceptionally kind, and intensely passionate crew.</p> <p>We seek to ignite that passion by setting high standards, championing teamwork, and creating work-life harmony as we collectively navigate rapid growth on a global scale while striving for greater equity and opportunity – inside and outside our organization.</p> <p>To flourish here, you must be prepared to set a high bar for yourself and those around you. There is always a way to contribute: Acting with autonomy, having accountability and being open to new perspectives are essential to our continued success.</p> <p>Our deep curiosity to learn and our eagerness to share diverse passions with others gives us balance and injects a one-of-a-kind vibrancy into our culture.</p> <p>If you are driven to solve exhilarating challenges and have a bias toward action in the face of change, you will be empowered to make a real impact here, with a sharp and passionate team at your back. If Braze sounds like a place where you can thrive, we can’t wait to meet you.</p></div><p>We are looking for a Workplace Experience professional to ensure the successful daily reception operations of our Singapore office. This individual will collaborate with local Braze team members in supporting the ongoing development of our global workplace reception initiatives. This role sits on the People Team and will report to the Regional Manager, Workplace Experience APAC.&nbsp;</p> <p>Braze is a fast-paced, rapidly growing company, and we need a self-starter who exercises sound judgment, takes initiative, and proactively enhances the employee experience. You’ll maintain a strong pulse on the needs of our Singapore employees and be adaptable to evolving global conditions and workplace dynamics. <strong>This role will be required to be in-office 5 days per week.&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><strong>WHAT YOU’LL DO</strong></p> <ul> <li>Be the first face of Braze - greet all visitors with warmth and professionalism, ensuring a smooth check-in experience and prompt communication with their hosts.</li> <li>Maintain a polished and welcoming reception area that reflects Braze’s high standards and creates a great first impression for employees, clients, partners, and vendors.</li> <li>Deliver best-in-class customer service to everyone who walks through the door, acting as a helpful and approachable point of contact for the office.</li> <li>Monitor and respond to workplace support tickets with a customer-first mindset, helping ensure world-class support for our APAC team.</li> <li>Assist with badge management, supporting the site lead in processing physical badge requests and managing employee access needs.</li> <li>Coordinate weekly lunch orders and catering for meetings and events, while managing pantry stock, suppliers, and ensuring kitchen and communal spaces are consistently clean, organised, and well-stocked.</li> <li>Balance multiple priorities with ease, responding to urgent needs while keeping day-to-day tasks running smoothly and on schedule.</li> <li>Support general office requests and workplace questions, helping employees get what they need to do their best work.</li> <li>Play a key role in in-office events, from helping manage access and check-in to assisting with logistics and creating a seamless experience.</li> <li>Be a flexible team player, jumping in to support the Workplace team with ad-hoc tasks, PTO coverage, and operational needs as they arise.</li> </ul> <p><strong>WHO YOU ARE</strong></p> <ul> <li>1-2 years of experience in a customer service role.</li> <li>Ability to work on-site, Monday to Friday, maintaining a full-time, in-office schedule.</li> <li>Someone who is confident, positive, and comfortable being in a highly visible role that will define the reputation of the Braze Workplace Team.</li> <li>Passion for best-in-class workplace experience and customer service.</li> <li>Able to multitask whilst always prioritizing the employee and visitor experience.&nbsp;</li> <li>A strong communicator with excellent grammatical skills.&nbsp;</li> <li>A sharp eye for detail and a sense of office pride.</li> <li>Data-driven with a mindset of continual improvement.</li> <li>Proactive and self-motivated with the ability to set own priorities.</li> <li>A creative problem-solver, bringing innovative ideas and solutions to the table.</li> <li>An awesome can-do attitude - no task is too big or too small.</li> <li>Ability to physically stand, bend, squat, and lift up to 25 to 30 pounds.</li> <li>Familiar with Mac computer and GSuite.</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><div class="p-rich_text_section"> <p><strong>WHAT WE OFFER<br></strong></p> <p><em>Braze benefits vary by location, and we encourage you to review our specific benefits offerings for each country </em><a href="https://www.braze.com/company/careers/how-we-hire#benefit-section"><em>here</em></a><em>. More details on benefits plans will be provided if you receive an offer of employment.</em></p> <p>From offering comprehensive benefits to fostering hybrid ways of working, we’ve got you covered so you can prioritize work-life harmony. Braze offers benefits such as:</p> <ul> <li>Competitive compensation that may include equity</li> <li>Retirement and Employee Stock Purchase Plans</li> <li>Flexible paid time off</li> <li>Comprehensive benefit plans covering medical, dental, vision, life, and disability</li> <li>Family services that include fertility benefits and equal paid parental leave</li> <li>Professional development supported by formal career pathing, learning platforms, and a yearly learning stipend</li> <li>A curated in-office employee experience, designed to foster community, team connections, and innovation</li> <li>Opportunities to give back to your community, including an annual company-wide Volunteer Week and donation matching&nbsp;</li> <li>Employee Resource Groups that provide supportive communities within Braze</li> <li>Collaborative, transparent, and fun culture recognized as a Great Place to Work®</li> </ul> <p><strong>ABOUT BRAZE<br><br></strong>Braze is the leading customer engagement platform that empowers brands to Be Absolutely Engaging.™ Braze helps brands deliver great customer experiences that drive value both for consumers and for their businesses. Built on a foundation of composable intelligence, BrazeAI™ allows marketers to combine and activate AI agents, models, and features at every touchpoint throughout the Braze Customer Engagement Platform for smarter, faster, and more meaningful customer engagement. From cross-channel messaging and journey orchestration to Al-powered decisioning and optimization, Braze enables companies to turn action into interaction through autonomous, 1:1 personalized experiences.<br><br>The company has repeatedly been recognized as a Leader in marketing technology by industry analysts, and was voted a G2 “Best of Marketing and Digital Advertising Software Product” in 2025.<br><br>Braze was also named a 2025 Best Companies To Work For by U.S. News &amp; World Report, a 2025 America’s Greatest Companies by Newsweek, and a 2025 Fortune Best Workplace in Technology™ by Great Place To Work®, among other accolades. Braze is also proudly certified as a Great Place to Work® in the U.S., the UK, Australia, and Singapore.<br><br>The company is headquartered in New York with offices in Austin, Berlin, Bucharest, Chicago, Dubai, Jakarta, London, Paris, San Francisco, São Paulo, Singapore, Seoul, Sydney and Tokyo.</p> <strong>BRAZE IS AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER</strong> <p>At Braze, we strive to create equitable growth and opportunities inside and outside the organization.</p> <p>Building meaningful connections is at the heart of everything we do, and that includes our recruiting practices. We're committed to offering all candidates a fair, accessible, and inclusive experience – regardless of age, color, disability, gender identity, marital status, maternity, national origin, pregnancy, race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, or status as a protected veteran. When applying and interviewing with Braze, we want you to feel comfortable showcasing what makes you <em>you</em>.</p> <p>We know that sometimes different circumstances can lead talented people to hesitate to apply for a role unless they meet 100% of the criteria. If this sounds familiar, we encourage you to apply, as we’d love to meet you.</p> <em>Please see our</em><a href="https://www.braze.com/company/legal/privacy-policy-job-candidates"><em> </em><em>Candidate Privacy Policy</em></a><em> for more information on how Braze processes your personal information during the recruitment process and, if applicable based on your location, how you can exercise any privacy rights.</em></div></div>

jobs.title: Commercial Partner Sales Specialist
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><em>At Klaviyo, we value the unique backgrounds, experiences and perspectives each Klaviyo (we call ourselves Klaviyos) brings to our workplace each and every day. We believe everyone deserves a fair shot at success and appreciate the experiences each person brings beyond the traditional job requirements. If you’re a close but not exact match with the description, we hope you’ll still consider applying. Want to learn more about life at Klaviyo? Visit <a class="_ymio1r31 _ypr0glyw _zcxs1o36 _mizu194a _1ah3dkaa _ra3xnqa1 _128mdkaa _1cvmnqa1 _4davt94y _4bfu18uv _1hms8stv _ajmmnqa1 _vchhusvi _kqswh2mm _ect4ttxp _syaz13af _1a3b18uv _4fpr8stv _5goinqa1 _f8pj13af _9oik18uv _1bnxglyw _jf4cnqa1 _30l313af _1nrm18uv _c2waglyw _1iohnqa1 _9h8h12zz _10531ra0 _1ien1ra0 _n0fx1ra0 _1vhv17z1" href="http://klaviyo.com/careers" data-renderer-mark="true">klaviyo.com/careers</a>&nbsp;to see how we empower creators to own their own destiny.</em></p></div><p><strong>About the Role:</strong><br><br>The Partnerships team drives Klaviyo's Owned Marketing vision by building and deepening relationships with the best advisory firms and technology companies in the world. With 5,000+ agency and technology partners, 350+ integrations, and 193,000+ brands actively searching for partner expertise, Klaviyo's ecosystem is one of the largest and most established in B2C marketing. For every $1 in Klaviyo MRR, partners report at least $3 in services revenue — making this a high-stakes, high-value ecosystem for everyone involved.</p> <p>As a Partner Sales Specialist, you'll be on the front lines — prospecting, recruiting, and onboarding new agency partners while activating dormant ones and expanding existing relationships. You'll qualify inbound referrals, collaborate closely with the sales team, and develop a sharp eye for high-potential opportunities across our long tail of partners.</p> <p>We're looking for someone with 1–2 years in a BDR/SDR or closing role who's ready to take that experience into the world of partnerships. You'll build lasting relationships, enable partners to grow with Klaviyo, and bring the hustle and collaborative spirit to make it all happen.</p> <p><strong>How you will make a difference:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Prospect, recruit, and onboard net new agency partners</li> <li>Orchestrate effective cold outreach across multiple channels</li> <li>Generate meetings for the sales team through the rapid response to and qualification of inbound leads from our partners</li> <li>Learn to effectively identify qualified leads, articulate Klaviyo’s value proposition, and route opportunities properly to the direct sales team</li> <li>Expand into agencies’ books of business with upsell opportunities</li> <li>Identify high-potential inactive partners and make a best effort to activate them through engagement</li> <li>Enable partners on new Klaviyo products and offerings</li> <li>Provide guidance and support to our existing partner network</li> <li>Collaborate with other members of the partnerships team to best support partners in your book of business</li> <li>Partner closely with the direct sales team to ensure an exceptional partner experience</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who you are:</strong></p> <ul> <li>1–2 years of BDR/SDR experience or a similar role; experience in a high-volume, high-velocity sales or partnership sales environment is a plus, especially at a MarTech SaaS company</li> <li>Highly adept at influencing and relationship building</li> <li>Bring your thinking, strategies, and ideas to advance our company’s values, unique culture, and vision for the future</li> <li>Curious, organized, engaging, and energetic</li> <li>Excited to be a part of and have an impact on a rapidly-growing, profitable scale-up</li> <li>Positive outlook, can-do attitude, and love helping to build and improve things</li> <li>Excellent organizational skills</li> </ul> <p>#LI- CR1 #LI-Hybrid</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>Massachusetts Applicants:<br></strong>It is unlawful in Massachusetts to require or administer a lie detector test as a condition of employment or continued employment. An employer who violates this law shall be subject to criminal penalties and civil liability.</p> <hr> <p>Our salary range reflects the cost of labor across various U.S. geographic markets. The range displayed below reflects the minimum and maximum target salaries for the position across all our US locations. The base salary offered for this position is determined by several factors, including the applicant’s job-related skills, relevant experience, education or training, and work location.</p> <p>In addition to base salary, our total compensation package may include participation in the company’s annual cash bonus plan, variable compensation (OTE) for sales and customer success roles, equity, sign-on payments, and a comprehensive range of health, welfare, and wellbeing benefits based on eligibility.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your recruiter can provide more details about the specific salary/OTE range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p></div><div class="title">Base Pay Range For US Locations:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$29.62</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$44.42 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><em>This role may require up to 10% travel for purposes such as new hire onboarding, client or partner work if applicable, team meetings, and industry events. Travel is coordinated in advance.</em></p> <p><strong>Get to Know Klaviyo</strong></p> <p>We’re Klaviyo (pronounced clay-vee-oh). We empower creators to own their destiny by making first-party data accessible and actionable like never before. We see limitless potential for the technology we’re developing to nurture personalized experiences in ecommerce and beyond. To reach our goals, we need our own crew of remarkable creators—ambitious and collaborative teammates who stay focused on our north star: delighting our customers. If you’re ready to do the best work of your career, where you’ll be welcomed as your whole self from day one and supported with generous benefits, we hope you’ll join us.</p> <p><em>AI fluency at Klaviyo includes responsible use of AI (including privacy, security, bias awareness, and human-in-the-loop). We provide accommodations as needed.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>By participating in Klaviyo’s interview process, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and will adhere to our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/careers/ai-guidance&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw0auUcRqeYRczM9UoXAKldj">Guidelines for using AI in the Klaviyo interview Process</a>. For more information about how we process your personal data, see our&nbsp;<a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-saferedirecturl="https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice&amp;source=gmail&amp;ust=1761072778777000&amp;usg=AOvVaw1axMoReIM1qwTbmaPcLI_b">Job Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.<br></em></p> <p><em>Klaviyo is committed to a policy of equal opportunity and non-discrimination. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, ethnicity, citizenship, national origin, color, religion or religious creed, age, sex (including pregnancy), gender identity, sexual orientation, physical or mental disability, veteran or active military status, marital status, criminal record, genetics, retaliation, sexual harassment or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.</em></p> <div id="1737752197.414839" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737752197.414839"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--default"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__right" data-qa="message_content"> <div class="c-message_kit__blocks c-message_kit__blocks--rich_text"> <div class="c-message__message_blocks c-message__message_blocks--rich_text" data-qa="message-text"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer" data-qa="block-kit-renderer"> <div class="p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper p-block_kit_renderer__block_wrapper--first"> <div class="p-rich_text_block"> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><em data-stringify-type="italic">IMPORTANT NOTICE: Our company takes the security and privacy of job applicants very seriously. We will never ask for payment, bank details, or personal financial information as part of the application process. All our legitimate job postings can be found on our official career site. Please be cautious of job offers that come from non-company email addresses (@klaviyo.com), instant messaging platforms, or unsolicited calls.</em></div> <div class="p-rich_text_section">&nbsp;</div> <div class="p-rich_text_section"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">By clicking "Submit Application" you consent to Klaviyo processing your Personal Data in accordance with our Job Applicant Privacy Notice.&nbsp; If you do not wish for Klaviyo to process your Personal Data, please do not submit an application.<em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp; </em></strong><em data-stringify-type="italic">You can find our Job Applicant Privacy Notice&nbsp;</em><em data-stringify-type="italic"><a class="c-link" href="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.klaviyo.com/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice" data-sk="tooltip_parent">here</a></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">&nbsp;and <a href="https://www.klaviyo.com/fr/legal/job-applicant-privacy-notice">here</a> (FR).</em></div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <div id="1737477146.268809" class="c-virtual_list__item" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1737477146.268809"> <div class="c-message_kit__background p-message_pane_message__message c-message_kit__message" data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" data-qa-placeholder="false"> <div class="c-message_kit__hover" data-qa-hover="true"> <div class="c-message_kit__actions c-message_kit__actions--above"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter"> <div class="c-message_kit__gutter__left">&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div></div>

jobs.title: Enterprise Sales Development Representative
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Our <a href="https://www.greenhouse.com/mission" target="_blank">mission</a> at Greenhouse is to make hiring work for everyone – so we go to great lengths to hire great people because we believe that they’re the foundation of our success. At Greenhouse, you’ll join a team that collaborates purposefully, fosters inclusivity, and communicates with transparency and accountability so we can help companies measurably improve the way they hire.&nbsp;</p> <p>Join us to do the best work of your career, solving meaningful problems with remarkable teams.</p></div><p>Are you passionate about a long-term career in sales and learning about what makes a successful salesperson? Do you have the emotional intelligence to read people and quickly get them on board? Do you thrive in competitive environments? If so, read on!</p> <p>As an <strong>Enterprise Sales Development Representative (SDR)</strong>, you'll be a key player in our strategy to move up-market and help larger organizations grow the workforce they need to succeed. You'll impact the bottom line by generating opportunities and partnering with our team of Enterprise Account Executives to enable won deals. Success in this role means hitting and exceeding monthly sales goals, staying ahead of daily metrics, and handling rejection in stride, all with the support of experienced managers and a team-focused environment. We have a strong focus on optimization and welcome new ideas on how to improve our lead generation process.</p> <h2><strong>Who will love this job</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>A captivating communicator –</strong> you have no fear on the phone and demonstrate excellent written skills for crafting strategic outreach</li> <li><strong>An evangelist –</strong> you believe in our product and are able to authentically tell the Greenhouse story</li> <li><strong>A self-starter – </strong>you find process in ambiguity and strive to over-deliver on all your responsibilities</li> <li><strong>A creative thinker –</strong> you discover new ways to approach your day-to-day and use data to build scalable campaigns</li> <li><strong>A driven winner –</strong> you understand that every day is a new opportunity to be the top performer</li> <li><strong>An intentional innovator </strong>– you leverage AI thoughtfully and strategically to amplify your impact, enhance productivity, and uncover smarter ways of working</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>What you’ll do</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Drive pipeline through account prioritization and personalized outreach within our key prospect accounts</li> <li>Partner 1:1 with a dedicated Enterprise AE to identify accounts and key contacts to target and nurture&nbsp;</li> <li>Provide a world-class prospect experience through each interaction in the sales process</li> <li>Qualify leads by learning about the prospect's approach to hiring</li> <li>Conduct market research to identify new potential customers and leads</li> <li>Additional projects and responsibilities as business needs require</li> </ul> <h2><strong>You should have</strong></h2> <ul> <li>1+ years as an SDR or relevant working experience preferred, as well as a track record of professional success&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience handling Enterprise accounts (1K employees or more)</li> <li>A high level of accountability, consistently working towards goals and demonstrating ownership over responsibilities, quota, and prospects</li> <li>An ability to nurture long-term prospect relationships&nbsp;</li> <li>A high standard of integrity and a strong work ethic, paired with effective prioritization and organizational skills</li> <li>An appetite for learning, with the ability to receive and implement feedback</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills</li> <li>Experience cold-calling and cold-emailing</li> <li>Experience working with Sales Technology (Salesforce, Salesloft, ZoomInfo)</li> <li>Your own unique talents! Your background has given you a unique perspective and set of transferable skills that aren't always in alignment with a given role - but those are qualities we value at Greenhouse. If you don't meet 100% of the qualifications outlined above, we still strongly encourage you to apply</li> </ul> <p><strong><em>If you have 1 or more years of selling experience into large organizations or comparable experience, this may be the role for you! If you’ve spent less time than this in sales or are looking into the SDR role with parallel professional experience, you may want to check out our Mid-Market SDR role!</em></strong></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Applicants must be currently authorized to work in the United States on a full-time basis.</span></em></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">If you are based in California, we encourage you to read this important information for California residents linked</span></em><a href="https://www.greenhouse.io/ccpa-candidate"> <em><span style="font-weight: 400;">here</span></em></a><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">.</span></em></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;"><strong>The national pay for this role is $64,400.00 base pay</strong>. Individual compensation will be commensurate with the candidate's experience and qualifications. Certain roles may be eligible for additional compensation, including stock option awards, bonuses, and merit increases. Additionally, certain roles have the opportunity to receive sales commissions that are based on the terms of the sales commission plan applicable to the role.</span></em></p> <p>Greenhouse provides a variety of benefits to employees, including medical, dental, and vision insurance, basic life insurance, mental health resources, financial wellness benefits, and a fully paid parental leave program. For US-based employees, we offer short-term and long-term disability coverage, a 401(k) plan and company match. U.S. based employees also receive, per calendar year, up to 14 scheduled paid holidays and up to 80 hours of paid sick leave. Non-exempt employees accrue up to 20-25 days of paid vacation time annually, depending on tenure, and exempt employees have flexible paid time off (PTO).</p> <p>The anticipated closing date for this role is&nbsp;<strong>Saturday</strong><strong>, April 25, 2026.&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h2><strong>Who we are</strong></h2> <p>At Greenhouse, we live by our mission through <a href="https://www.greenhouse.com/interviewing-at-greenhouse" target="_blank">using our own product</a> to help us hire the right person for the job, every time. We are a remote-first company and have shared office spaces in New York City and Ireland, and optional co-working spaces that give us flexibility to do our best work anywhere. We take an active role in our growth through a performance review program that’s committed to providing actionable feedback, and a bonus structure that rewards great performance. We believe that bringing together a variety of perspectives makes us a stronger company – and we nurture leaders who create an inclusive culture and invest into employee resource groups that celebrate our differences and life experiences. We’re proud to have built an <a href="https://www.greenhouse.com/awards" target="_blank">award-winning culture</a> that’s been recognized as Fortune’s Best Places to Work and Inc.’s Best Workplaces multiple years in a row.&nbsp;</p> <p>–&nbsp;</p> <p><em>Greenhouse Software is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, or gender identity), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation during the application process, reach out to accommodations@greenhouse.io.</em></p> <p><em>Emails about job opportunities at Greenhouse Software are only offered by employees with @greenhouse.io email addresses. See </em><a href="https://www.greenhouse.com/candidate-phishing-scams" target="_blank"><em>this page</em></a><em> on our website if you suspect a phishing scam.</em></p></div>

jobs.title: Procurement Operations Analyst
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>At Braze, we have found our people. We’re a genuinely approachable, exceptionally kind, and intensely passionate crew.</p> <p>We seek to ignite that passion by setting high standards, championing teamwork, and creating work-life harmony as we collectively navigate rapid growth on a global scale while striving for greater equity and opportunity – inside and outside our organization.</p> <p>To flourish here, you must be prepared to set a high bar for yourself and those around you. There is always a way to contribute: Acting with autonomy, having accountability and being open to new perspectives are essential to our continued success.</p> <p>Our deep curiosity to learn and our eagerness to share diverse passions with others gives us balance and injects a one-of-a-kind vibrancy into our culture.</p> <p>If you are driven to solve exhilarating challenges and have a bias toward action in the face of change, you will be empowered to make a real impact here, with a sharp and passionate team at your back. If Braze sounds like a place where you can thrive, we can’t wait to meet you.</p></div><p><strong>WHAT YOU’LL DO</strong></p> <p>Braze is growing and seeking someone to help us scale our Procurement operations. This new position on the Finance team will be responsible for global activities related to the procurement of corporate goods and services including technology, marketing, facilities, etc. We are looking for someone who can collaborate extremely well with internal partners like Accounting, Legal, and Finance as well as internal stakeholders to develop and execute our procurement to pay lifecycle to align with business requirements and exceed objectives.</p> <p>Main responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li>Purchase Order creation and tracking</li> <li>Collaborate with Business Owners to monitor and manage Purchase Requisitions and Purchase Orders throughout the PR/PO lifecycle; including business partner outreach, updating ownership and closing out POs</li> <li>Support for DocuSign contract routing</li> <li>Entering/Correcting/Tracking existing and new vendor contract details</li> <li>Vendor contract renewal reminders for business owners</li> <li>Manage invoice issues and get them fixed in collaboration with Accounts Payable</li> <li>Manage the vendor onboarding process</li> <li>Help aggregate and archive all existing and future vendor contracts to a centralized location</li> <li>Assist and train end users with the creation of Purchase Orders and all other P2P activities</li> </ul> <p><strong>WHO YOU ARE</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s Degree with 2+ years experience in procurement, strategic sourcing, or partner management</li> <li>Some technology contract experience with SaaS, Subscription, and Marketing is a plus, but not needed</li> <li>Financial, tech and process-savvy person who loves to improve processes, systems and tools that benefit our teams and internal customers and partners</li> <li>Team player with collaborative style and proven track record of building successful relationships with stakeholders and suppliers</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills</li> <li>Strong analytical skills</li> <li>Enjoy learning new technology, and you have deep experience configuring and continuously improving various procurement operations tools, systems and supporting software tools like; Coupa, Netsuite, JIRA and contract management systems</li> <li>Sound judgment with the knowledge to resolve complicated matters while maintaining integrity and confidentiality</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><div class="p-rich_text_section"> <p><strong>WHAT WE OFFER<br></strong></p> <p><em>Braze benefits vary by location, and we encourage you to review our specific benefits offerings for each country </em><a href="https://www.braze.com/company/careers/how-we-hire#benefit-section"><em>here</em></a><em>. More details on benefits plans will be provided if you receive an offer of employment.</em></p> <p>From offering comprehensive benefits to fostering hybrid ways of working, we’ve got you covered so you can prioritize work-life harmony. Braze offers benefits such as:</p> <ul> <li>Competitive compensation that may include equity</li> <li>Retirement and Employee Stock Purchase Plans</li> <li>Flexible paid time off</li> <li>Comprehensive benefit plans covering medical, dental, vision, life, and disability</li> <li>Family services that include fertility benefits and equal paid parental leave</li> <li>Professional development supported by formal career pathing, learning platforms, and a yearly learning stipend</li> <li>A curated in-office employee experience, designed to foster community, team connections, and innovation</li> <li>Opportunities to give back to your community, including an annual company-wide Volunteer Week and donation matching&nbsp;</li> <li>Employee Resource Groups that provide supportive communities within Braze</li> <li>Collaborative, transparent, and fun culture recognized as a Great Place to Work®</li> </ul> <p><strong>ABOUT BRAZE<br><br></strong>Braze is the leading customer engagement platform that empowers brands to Be Absolutely Engaging.™ Braze helps brands deliver great customer experiences that drive value both for consumers and for their businesses. Built on a foundation of composable intelligence, BrazeAI™ allows marketers to combine and activate AI agents, models, and features at every touchpoint throughout the Braze Customer Engagement Platform for smarter, faster, and more meaningful customer engagement. From cross-channel messaging and journey orchestration to Al-powered decisioning and optimization, Braze enables companies to turn action into interaction through autonomous, 1:1 personalized experiences.<br><br>The company has repeatedly been recognized as a Leader in marketing technology by industry analysts, and was voted a G2 “Best of Marketing and Digital Advertising Software Product” in 2025.<br><br>Braze was also named a 2025 Best Companies To Work For by U.S. News &amp; World Report, a 2025 America’s Greatest Companies by Newsweek, and a 2025 Fortune Best Workplace in Technology™ by Great Place To Work®, among other accolades. Braze is also proudly certified as a Great Place to Work® in the U.S., the UK, Australia, and Singapore.<br><br>The company is headquartered in New York with offices in Austin, Berlin, Bucharest, Chicago, Dubai, Jakarta, London, Paris, San Francisco, São Paulo, Singapore, Seoul, Sydney and Tokyo.</p> <strong>BRAZE IS AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER</strong> <p>At Braze, we strive to create equitable growth and opportunities inside and outside the organization.</p> <p>Building meaningful connections is at the heart of everything we do, and that includes our recruiting practices. We're committed to offering all candidates a fair, accessible, and inclusive experience – regardless of age, color, disability, gender identity, marital status, maternity, national origin, pregnancy, race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, or status as a protected veteran. When applying and interviewing with Braze, we want you to feel comfortable showcasing what makes you <em>you</em>.</p> <p>We know that sometimes different circumstances can lead talented people to hesitate to apply for a role unless they meet 100% of the criteria. If this sounds familiar, we encourage you to apply, as we’d love to meet you.</p> <em>Please see our</em><a href="https://www.braze.com/company/legal/privacy-policy-job-candidates"><em> </em><em>Candidate Privacy Policy</em></a><em> for more information on how Braze processes your personal information during the recruitment process and, if applicable based on your location, how you can exercise any privacy rights.</em></div></div>

jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Our <a href="https://www.greenhouse.com/mission" target="_blank">mission</a> at Greenhouse is to make hiring work for everyone – so we go to great lengths to hire great people because we believe that they’re the foundation of our success.
